vocabulary.definition: v. 增加, 增长；[计] 增加; 增量; 添加
vocabulary.context: More and more individuals - and companies - are augmenting, even bypassing entirely, traditional legal process hoping to get a more favorable hearing in public.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 越来越多的个人和公司正在扩大甚至完全绕过传统的法律程序，希望在公开场合获得更有利的听证会

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不顾的, 无关的, 没关系的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们知道，法院对富人和穷人的待遇是不同的，公司可以逃脱个人不能犯下的罪行，有权势的人可以游说以获得他们想要的具体法律和法规--无论任何公平观念如何

vocabulary.definition: n. 救济品, 失业救济金；v.t. 发放救济
vocabulary.context: Courts are intended to be impartial and fair in doling out their justice, and societies flourish based on the extent to which we approach this ideal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 法院在伸张正义时旨在做到公正和公平，社会的繁荣取决于我们实现这一理想的程度

vocabulary.context: And while it's still a surprise when some cases go viral while others languish in obscurity, it's simply more effective to present your case on Facebook or Twitter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然有些案例像病毒一样传播而另一些案例却默默无闻，这仍然令人惊讶，但在 Facebook 或 Twitter 上展示您的案例会更有效

vocabulary.definition: n. 公司, 商号；adj. 坚定的, 坚强的, 牢固的, 结实的, 坚硬的, 坚挺的, 严格的, 确定的；v.t. 使牢固, 使坚定；v.i. 变稳固, 变坚实；adv. 稳固地
vocabulary.context: They've hired firms to monitor Facebook, Twitter, and other internet venues where these battles originate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们聘请了公司来监控 Facebook、Twitter 和其他引发这些战斗的互联网场所

vocabulary.definition: n. 无能力, 无资格
vocabulary.context: Too often, criminal sentences prioritize punishment and incapacitation over deterrence and rehabilitation, with no thought given to the social network effects destroying families.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 刑事判决往往优先考虑惩罚和丧失行为能力，而不是威慑和康复，而没有考虑到破坏家庭的社会网络效应

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 未来，我们必须停止将监狱视为非暴力犯罪、审前拘留或技术假释违法行为的唯一选择

vocabulary.context: I had become acclimated to shorter distances," he said, attributing this change to the shrinkage of his hippocampus, "I cannot, even to this day, acclimate myself to broader distance.

vocabulary.context: For one, there's the fact that a large amount of brain activity is driven by circadian rhythms, which are in turn set by exposure to the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 首先，事实是大量的大脑活动是由昼夜节律驱动的，而昼夜节律又是由暴露在阳光下决定的

vocabulary.definition: n. 悸动, 跳动, 心跳；[医] 心悸, 心跳
vocabulary.context: A majority of those surveyed experienced symptoms such as dizziness, heart palpitations, chronic depression, while 41 percent reported hallucinations, and 27 percent had suicidal thoughts - all levels significantly higher than those of the overall prison populations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数接受调查的人都经历过头晕、心悸、慢性抑郁等症状，41% 的人报告出现幻觉，27% 的人有自杀念头--所有水平都显着高于监狱总体人口的水平

vocabulary.definition: n. 幻觉, 幻想；[医] 幻觉
vocabulary.context: A majority of those surveyed experienced symptoms such as dizziness, heart palpitations, chronic depression, while 41 percent reported hallucinations, and 27 percent had suicidal thoughts - all levels significantly higher than those of the overall prison populations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数接受调查的人都经历过头晕、心悸、慢性抑郁等症状，41% 的人报告出现幻觉，27% 的人有自杀念头--所有水平都显着高于监狱总体人口的水平

vocabulary.definition: adv. 去不掉, 擦不掉, 洗不掉, 持久
vocabulary.context: According to a panel of scientists that recently spoke at the American Association for the Advancement of Science's annual meeting in Chicago, research tells us that solitary is both ineffective as a rehabilitation technique and indelibly harmful to the mental health of those detained.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最近在芝加哥举行的美国科学促进会年会上发言的科学家小组表示，研究告诉我们，单独监禁作为一种康复技术不仅无效，而且对被拘留者的心理健康产生不可磨灭的危害

vocabulary.definition: n. 收缩, 收缩量, 减低；[化] 起皱; 收缩; 收缩量
vocabulary.context: I had become acclimated to shorter distances," he said, attributing this change to the shrinkage of his hippocampus, "I cannot, even to this day, acclimate myself to broader distance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我已经习惯了较短的距离，"他说，并将这种变化归因于他的海马体的缩小，"即使到今天，我也无法让自己适应更远的距离

vocabulary.definition: adv. 至关重要地, 关键地
vocabulary.context: The hippocampus, in particular, has been found to dramatically shrink in the brains of people who are depressed or stressed for extended periods, a concern because it's crucially involved in memory, geographic orientation, cognition and decision-making.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尤其是，人们发现，长期处于抑郁或压力状态的人大脑中的海马体会显着萎缩，这一点令人担忧，因为它与记忆、地理定位、认知和决策至关重要

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全无的, 缺乏的
vocabulary.context: Most prisoners spent at least 23 hours per day in this environment, devoid of stimuli (some are allowed in a yard or indoor area for an hour or less daily), and are denied physical contact on visits from friends and family, so they may go years or decades without touching another human, apart from when they're placed in physical restraints by guards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数囚犯每天在这种没有刺激的环境中度过至少 23 个小时（有些囚犯每天被允许在院子或室内区域呆一个小时或更短时间），并且在朋友和家人探访时被禁止进行身体接触，因此他们可能数年或数十年都没有接触过其他人，除非他们被看守进行身体限制

vocabulary.definition: n. 神视, 超人的视力, 洞察力；[医] 千里眼, 神视
vocabulary.context: Read in the right way, our fears are an amazing gift of the imagination, a kind of everyday clairvoyance, a way of glimpsing what might be the future when there's still time to influence how that future will play out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以正确的方式阅读，我们的恐惧是想象力的惊人礼物，一种日常的千里眼，一种在仍有时间影响未来如何发展时瞥见未来的方式

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好色的, 猥亵的, 黄色的；[法] 淫秽的, 黄色的, 淫荡的
vocabulary.context: And maybe if we all tried to read our fears, we too would be less often swayed by the most salacious among them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许如果我们都尝试解读自己的恐惧，我们也不会经常被其中最淫荡的恐惧所左右

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无心的, 不是故意的；[法] 非故意的, 无意的, 无心的
vocabulary.context: It's a kind of unintentional storytelling that we are all born knowing how to do.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一种无意识的讲故事，我们生来就知道如何去做

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有深刻见解的, 富有洞察力的
vocabulary.context: What if we thought of fear as an amazing act of the imagination, something that can be as profound and insightful as storytelling itself?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们认为恐惧是一种令人惊叹的想象力行为，可以像讲故事本身一样深刻和富有洞察力，结果会怎样呢？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 微妙的( subtle的最高级 ); 敏感的; 狡猾的; 巧妙的
vocabulary.context: Just as the most nuanced stories in literature are often the richest, so too might our subtlest fears be the truest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正如文学中最微妙的故事往往是最丰富的一样，我们最微妙的恐惧也可能是最真实的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 微妙的( subtle的比较级 ); 敏感的; 狡猾的; 巧妙的
vocabulary.context: Maybe then we'd spend less time worrying about serial killers and plane crashes, and more time concerned with the subtler and slower disasters we face: the silent buildup of plaque in our arteries, the gradual changes in our climate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许那时我们会花更少的时间担心连环杀手和飞机失事，而花更多的时间关注我们面临的更微妙、更缓慢的灾难：动脉中斑块的无声堆积、气候的逐渐变化

vocabulary.definition: n. 嗜食同类, 食人, 嗜血成性
vocabulary.context: When the last of the survivors were finally picked up by two passing ships, less than half of the men were left alive, and some of them had resorted to their own form of cannibalism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当最后的幸存者最终被两艘路过的船只救起时，只有不到一半的人活着，其中一些人已经采取了自己的同类相食的方式

vocabulary.definition: n. 偏执狂, 多疑症；[法] 妄想狂, 偏执狂
vocabulary.context: I read about a study recently of successful entrepreneurs, and the author found that these people shared a habit that he called "productive paranoia," which meant that these people, instead of dismissing their fears, these people read them closely, they studied them, and then they translated that fear into preparation and action.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我最近读到了一篇关于成功企业家的研究，作者发现这些人有一个他称之为"生产性偏执"的习惯，这意味着这些人不是消除他们的恐惧，而是仔细阅读它们，研究它们，然后将恐惧转化为准备和行动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 火烧似的, 苍白的, 华丽的, 可怕的
vocabulary.context: Of all the narratives their fears wrote, they responded only to the most lurid, the most vivid, the one that was easiest for their imaginations to picture: cannibals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们的恐惧写下的所有叙述中，他们只对最耸人听闻、最生动、最容易用他们的想象力描绘的叙述做出回应：食人者

vocabulary.definition: n. 悬疑, 焦虑, 悬念, 悬而不决；[经] 未定, 暂记

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 恐惧也有悬念

vocabulary.definition: adj. 黏土的；[建] 泥质的, 含粘土的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的新衣服沾满了油污，沾满泥土，我累坏了

vocabulary.definition: n. 鞣桶放置场, 制革厂
vocabulary.context: We went down the hill and found Jo Harper and Ben Rogers, and two or three more of the boys, hid in the old tanyard.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们下了山，发现乔·哈珀和本·罗杰斯，以及另外两三个男孩，躲在旧制革厂里

vocabulary.definition: n. 路劫, 拦路强盗；[法] 强盗

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 混合, 使微醉, 使咬字不清晰；v.i. 胡乱对付；n. 困惑, 混浊状态
vocabulary.context: Do you want to go to doing different from what's in the books, and get things all muddled up?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你想去做与书本上不同的事情，把事情搞得一团糟吗？"

vocabulary.definition: v. 付赎金救人, 赎金( ransom的过去式和过去分词 )

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些当局有不同的看法，但大多数人认为最好杀死他们--除了一些你带到这里的山洞里的人，并保留他们直到他们被赎回。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 知识水平高的, 高雅的, 高尚的, 调子高的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他说，有一些，但其余的都是盗版书和强盗书，每个高调的帮派都有

vocabulary.context: "We ain't burglars.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们不是窃贼

vocabulary.definition: adv. 异常地；超自然地；不可思议地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们确实异常敏锐和警觉

vocabulary.definition: adv. 隆重地
vocabulary.context: He thanked her ceremoniously, bowed to her husband and rode away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他隆重地谢过她，向她的丈夫鞠了一躬，然后骑马走了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不可思议地
vocabulary.context: These pains appeared to flash along well defined lines of ramification and to beat with an inconceivably rapid periodicity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些疼痛似乎沿着明确的分枝线闪现，并以令人难以置信的快速周期性跳动

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无效地, 无益地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两名哨兵再次独立开枪，但没有效果

vocabulary.definition: n. 勒杀, 绞死, 压缩；[医] 绞窄; 勒颈, 勒颈窒息
vocabulary.context: There was no additional strangulation; the noose about his neck was already suffocating him and kept the water from his lungs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有发生额外的勒杀事件；他脖子上的绞索已经让他窒息，并阻止了他肺部的水分

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不多旅行的, 未远行过的, 人迹不到的, 无人迹的
vocabulary.context: It was as wide and straight as a city street, yet it seemed untraveled.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它像城市街道一样宽阔笔直，但似乎无人走过

vocabulary.definition: n. 稀罕

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着频率的降低，声音的强度和尖锐度也随之增加

vocabulary.definition: n. 定期性, 周期性, 频率, 周波；[化] 周期性
vocabulary.context: These pains appeared to flash along well defined lines of ramification and to beat with an inconceivably rapid periodicity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些疼痛似乎沿着明确的分枝线闪现，并以令人难以置信的快速周期性跳动

vocabulary.definition: n. 司令官
vocabulary.context: The commandant has issued an order, which is posted everywhere, declaring that any civilian caught interfering with the railroad, its bridges, tunnels, or trains will be summarily hanged.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 指挥官已发布命令，并张贴在各处，宣布任何干扰铁路、桥梁、隧道或火车的平民将被立即绞死

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 送气发音, 以/h/音开始读出, 吸；n. /h/音, 送气音；adj. 送气音的, /h/音的
vocabulary.context: Although no soldier, he had frequented camps enough to know the dread significance of that deliberate, drawling, aspirated chant; the lieutenant on shore was taking a part in the morning's work.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然他不是士兵，但他经常光顾营地，足以知道那句刻意的、拖长的、带气的口号的可怕意义；岸上的中尉正在参加早上的工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 油商, 加油工, 涂油者, 注油壶；[化] 加油器; 加油者
vocabulary.context: The oiler, steering with one of the two oars in the boat, sometimes raised himself suddenly to keep clear of water that swirled in over the stern.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 加油工用船上的两支桨之一操纵，有时会突然抬起身子，以避开从船尾打旋的水

vocabulary.definition: adj. 吵闹的, 喧嚣的, 骚乱的, 不守秩序的
vocabulary.context: His head, pillowed on a thwart, was within an inch of the swirl of a wave crest, and sometimes a particularly obstreperous sea came in-board and drenched him once more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的头枕在横座上，距离波峰的漩涡只有一英寸，有时，特别凶猛的海水会冲上船，再次把他淋湿

vocabulary.definition: n. 同志关系, 友谊, 伙伴情谊
vocabulary.context: And after this devotion to the commander of the boat there was this comradeship that the correspondent, for instance, who had been taught to be cynical of men, knew even at the time was the best experience of his life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在对船长的奉献之后，有一种同志情谊，例如，被教导要对人类保持愤世嫉俗的记者，即使在当时也知道这是他一生中最好的经历

vocabulary.definition: n. 解开纠结
vocabulary.context: "Billie!" There was a slow and gradual disentanglement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "比利！"双方的关系慢慢地、逐渐地解开了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 毫无疑问
vocabulary.context: Viewed from a balcony, the whole thing would doubtlessly have been weirdly picturesque.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从阳台上看去，整个事情无疑是异常美丽的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 率直地, 正直地
vocabulary.context: The correspondent wondered ingenuously how in the name of all that was sane could there be people who thought it amusing to row a boat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 记者天真地想知道，以理智的名义，怎么会有人认为划船很有趣

vocabulary.definition: n. 救生用具
vocabulary.context: The piece of life-preserver lay under him, and sometimes he whirled down the incline of a wave as if he were on a hand-sled.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 救生衣的碎片躺在他的身下，有时他沿着波浪的斜坡旋转，就像坐在手拉雪橇上一样

vocabulary.definition: adj. 碎片的, 碎屑的, 片断的, 断片的, 碎块的, 不完全的, 不连续的, 不完整的
vocabulary.context: The cook's arm was around the oiler's shoulders, and, with their fragmentary clothing and haggard faces, they were the babes of the sea, a grotesque rendering of the old babes in the wood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 厨师的手臂搂着加油工的肩膀，她们衣衫褴褛，面容憔悴，就像是海里的宝贝，是树林里的老宝贝的怪诞翻版

vocabulary.definition: adv. 懊悔地
vocabulary.context: "Oh, I'm awful sorry, Billie," said the correspondent contritely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "哦，我非常抱歉，比莉，"记者悔恨地说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无礼地；放肆地
vocabulary.context: After a search, somebody produced three dry matches, and thereupon the four waifs rode impudently in their little boat, and with an assurance of an impending rescue shining in their eyes, puffed at the big cigars and judged well and ill of all men.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经过一番搜查，有人拿出了三根干火柴，于是四个流浪儿就无礼地驾着小船，眼里闪着救援即将到来的确信，吸着大雪茄，对所有人做出好坏判断

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不灭的, 不朽的
vocabulary.context: ...them strong and confident, invincible in the bloody onset; help them to crush the foe, grant to them and to their flag and country imperishable honor and glory -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ......他们坚强而自信，在血腥的进攻中所向无敌；帮助他们粉碎敌人，给予他们、他们的旗帜和国家不朽的荣誉和荣耀--

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不假思索地；轻率地
vocabulary.context: And ignorantly and unthinkingly?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并且无知且不假思索？

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无知地；不学无术地
vocabulary.context: And ignorantly and unthinkingly?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并且无知且不假思索？

vocabulary.definition: n. 祈祷, 符咒
vocabulary.context: The service proceeded; a war chapter from the Old Testament was read; the first prayer was said; it was followed by an organ burst that shook the building, and with one impulse the house rose, with glowing eyes and beating hearts, and poured out that tremendous invocation -
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 服务继续进行；读了《旧约》中的战争章节；进行了第一个祈祷；随之而来的是一阵风琴的爆响，震动了整栋大楼，随着一股冲动，房子升了起来，眼睛发光，心脏跳动，倾吐出那巨大的祈祷--

vocabulary.definition: n. 死人般的, 恐怖的, 糟透的
vocabulary.context: An aged stranger entered and moved with slow and noiseless step up the main aisle, his eyes fixed upon the minister, his long body clothed in a robe that reached to his feet, his head bare, his white hair descending in a frothy cataract to his shoulders, his seamy face unnaturally pale, pale even to ghastliness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位上了年纪的陌生人进来了，他缓慢而无声地走上主过道，他的眼睛盯着牧师，他修长的身体穿着长及脚的长袍，他光着头，白发如泡沫般的瀑布般垂到肩膀上，他那张肮脏的脸苍白得不自然，苍白到可怕

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 延长, 拖延, 伸出, 绘制；[法] 延迟, 拖延, 延长
vocabulary.context: ...imploring Thee for the refuge of the grave and denied it - for our sakes who adore Thee, Lord, blast their hopes, blight their lives, protract their bitter pilgrimage, make heavy their steps, water their way with their tears, stain the white snow with the blood of their wounded feet!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...恳求你庇护坟墓，却拒绝了--主啊，为了我们这些崇拜你的人，粉碎他们的希望，毁掉他们的生命，延长他们痛苦的朝圣之旅，使他们的脚步沉重，用他们的泪水浇灌他们的道路，用他们受伤脚的血染红白雪！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无屋顶的, 无家的, 无屋可住的
vocabulary.context: ...with a hurricane of fire; help us to wring the hearts of their unoffending widows with unavailing grief; help us to turn them out roofless with their little children to wander unfriended the wastes of their desolated land in rags and hunger and thirst, sports of the sun flames of summer and the icy winds of winter, broken in spirit, worn...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...伴随着飓风的火；帮助我们用无助的悲伤来揪住那些无罪的寡妇的心；帮助我们把他们和他们的孩子们赶出无家可归的地方，在他们荒凉的土地上孤零零地流浪，衣衫褴褛，饥渴交加，在夏天的烈日炎炎和冬天的冰冷的寒风中进行运动，精神崩溃，疲惫不堪......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 悔悟了的, 后悔的, 痛悔的
vocabulary.context: We ask it, in the spirit of love, of Him Who is the Source of Love, and Who is the ever-faithful refuge and friend of all that are sore beset and seek His aid with humble and contrite hearts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们本着爱的精神向爱的源头祈求，他是所有遭受痛苦困扰并以谦卑和悔罪的心寻求他帮助的人永远忠实的避难所和朋友

vocabulary.definition: adj. 善良的, 仁慈的, 和蔼的, 有益的；[医] 良性的
vocabulary.context: The burden of its supplication was, that an ever-merciful and benignant Father of us all would watch over our noble young soldiers, and aid, comfort, and encourage them in their patriotic work; bless them, shield them in the day of battle and the hour of peril, bear them in...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其祈求的重担是，我们所有人的永远仁慈和仁慈的父亲会看顾我们高贵的年轻士兵，并帮助、安慰和鼓励他们的爱国工作；祝福他们，在战斗的日子和危险的时刻保护他们，带他们进去......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 露出线缝的, 丑恶的
vocabulary.context: An aged stranger entered and moved with slow and noiseless step up the main aisle, his eyes fixed upon the minister, his long body clothed in a robe that reached to his feet, his head bare, his white hair descending in a frothy cataract to his shoulders, his seamy face unnaturally pale, pale even to ghastliness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位上了年纪的陌生人进来了，他缓慢而无声地走上主过道，他的眼睛盯着牧师，他修长的身体穿着长及脚的长袍，他光着头，白发如泡沫般的瀑布般垂到肩膀上，他那张肮脏的脸苍白得不自然，苍白到可怕

vocabulary.definition: n. 灵车
vocabulary.context: Attend the progress of his hearse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 观看他的灵车的行驶情况

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不名誉的, 可耻的, 不出名的
vocabulary.context: And so inglorious, after all!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毕竟，这是多么不光彩啊！

vocabulary.definition: n. 指责, 谴责, 非难；v.t. 斥责, 指责, 制止
vocabulary.context: Let pride be taught by this rebuke,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让这种责备教导我们骄傲，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 这边的, 在这边的；adv. 向这边, 向此处

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 来这里吧，看看你的命运

vocabulary.definition: adv. 从何处, 出于什么原因, 从哪个；n. 来处, 根源
vocabulary.context: Turned to that dirt from whence he sprung.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 转向他出生的泥土

vocabulary.definition: n. 荣誉, 头衔, 信用, 尊敬, 名誉, 阁下, 勋章；v.t. 尊敬, 授予荣誉, 承兑, 实践
vocabulary.context: He had those honours in his day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他那个时代，他曾获得过这些荣誉

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 看到, 注视；v.i. 看
vocabulary.context: Behold his funeral appears,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 看他的葬礼出现了，

vocabulary.definition: n. 良心；[法] 良心, 道德感, 正义感
vocabulary.context: 'Twas time in conscience he should die
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "从良心上看，他应该死"

vocabulary.definition: n. 利润, 赢利, 利益；v.i. 有益, 获利, 赚钱；v.t. 有益于
vocabulary.context: True to his profit and his pride,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 忠于他的利益和他的骄傲，

vocabulary.definition: n. 解脱, 生命的终止, 偿清；[法] 偿清, 解除, 清除
vocabulary.context: When he himself might his quietus make
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他自己可以安静下来时

vocabulary.definition: n. 大眼粗针, 锥子
vocabulary.context: With a bare bodkin?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 用一个裸露的 bodkin？

vocabulary.definition: n. 小溪, 目的地,界限,境界
vocabulary.context: The undiscovered country, from whose bourn
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 未被发现的国度，来自其源头

vocabulary.definition: n. 无礼, 傲慢, 侮辱
vocabulary.context: Th' oppressor's wrong, the proud man's contumely
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 压迫者的错误，骄傲的人的侮辱

vocabulary.definition: adv. 虔诚地, 虔敬地, 衷心地
vocabulary.context: Devoutly to be wished.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虔诚地祈愿

vocabulary.definition: n. 傲慢, 无耻, 傲慢态度；[法] 无礼, 蛮横, 侮辱性言行
vocabulary.context: The insolence of office, and the spurns
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公职的无礼和蔑视

vocabulary.definition: n. 剧痛, 悲痛, 苦闷；v.t. 使剧痛, 折磨
vocabulary.context: The pangs of despised love, the law's delay,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 被蔑视的爱情的痛苦，法律的迟延，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 病弱的, 令人不快的, 无精打采的；adv. 病态地；v.t. 使现病容
vocabulary.context: Is sicklied o'er with the pale cast of thought,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因思想苍白而病态，

vocabulary.definition: adv. 偶然, 恐怕, 间或
vocabulary.context: To sleep - perchance to dream: ay, there's the rub,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 睡觉--也许会做梦：哎，有麻烦了，

vocabulary.definition: n. 吝啬鬼
vocabulary.context: Competition obliges the humane employer to adopt the same methods as the skinflint, or go out of business, and, as a consequence, the lowest rate of compensation for which men will work is all that he will pay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 竞争迫使仁慈的雇主采取与吝啬鬼相同的方法，否则就会破产，因此，男人愿意付出的最低报酬就是他所能支付的全部

vocabulary.definition: n. 分配者, 共同收受者, 参与者；[计] 共享者
vocabulary.context: The final solution of the work-day problem will come when the workman becomes a sharer in what he creates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当工人成为他所创造的东西的共享者时，工作日问题的最终解决方案就会到来

vocabulary.definition: n. 西风, 和风, 徐风
vocabulary.context: It is true that philosophers and philanthropists have spoken in favor of the "man who worked," but their pleadings and writings had no more effect on the minds of the wealth-getters than has a zephyr on the Eiffel Tower.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 确实，哲学家和慈善家都曾说过支持"工作的人"，但他们的恳求和著作对财富获取者的心灵的影响并不比埃菲尔铁塔上的和风更大

vocabulary.definition: adv. 相应地, 相对地
vocabulary.context: They argue in this fashion: If the hours of labor are cut down to eight, the idle men who have flocked to this country will be employed, and we shall be correspondingly happy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们这样论证：如果劳动时间减少到八小时，涌入这个国家的闲人就会得到就业，我们就会相应地幸福

vocabulary.definition: n. 会计室；帐房
vocabulary.context: Until recent years it was not supposed that the clerk or the employee of the counting-house should remain at his post a shorter number of hours than the mechanic or the laborer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到最近几年，人们还不认为会计室的职员或雇员在其岗位上的工作时间不应比机械师或工人短

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爱好学问的, 用功的, 勤学的, 故意的
vocabulary.context: A thinking, studious man will learn that overexertion shortens life, and he will guard against it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个有思想、好学的人会知道过度劳累会缩短寿命，并且他会对此加以警惕

vocabulary.definition: n. 贫民收容所
vocabulary.context: They remain poor and retire only to the poor-house or the cemetery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们仍然贫穷，只能到济贫院或墓地退休

vocabulary.definition: n. 装饰, 装饰品
vocabulary.context: Previous to 1825 men worked from sun-up to sun-down, and they saw but little of their homes on what was then rigidly observed as "the Sabbath." The adornment of the home gave the head of the family no concern, for he spent but a short time in the house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1825年之前，人们从日出到日落工作，在当时严格遵守的"安息日"期间，他们很少能看到自己的家。一家之主并不关心房子的装饰，因为他在房子里呆的时间很短

vocabulary.definition: v. 位于或存在于（某物）之下( underlie的第三人称单数 ); 构成…的基础（或起因）, 引起
vocabulary.context: Too many advocates of the eight-hour day are in ignorance of the vital principle which underlies the agitation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 太多八小时工作制的倡导者忽视了这一鼓动背后的重要原则

vocabulary.definition: n. 迅速, 急速, 速度

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 见证女性迅速涌入男性空出的位置，我们意识到，所需要的不再是力量，而是技能

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直接在额头上 -

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不同时的, 不同期的, 异步的；[计] 异步的
vocabulary.context: Back in Houston, engineers knew that because of Apollo's unique asynchronous processing, the computer would focus on the task at hand - landing the Eagle on the Sea of Tranquility.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 回到休斯敦，工程师们知道，由于阿波罗独特的异步处理，计算机将专注于手头的任务--将鹰号降落在宁静之海

vocabulary.definition: n. 大学肄业生, 尚未取得学位的大学生；adj. 大学生的
vocabulary.context: Hamilton, a 24-year-old with an undergrad degree in mathematics, had gotten a job as a programmer at MIT, and the plan was for her to support her husband through his three-year stint at Harvard Law.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 24 岁的汉密尔顿拥有数学本科学位，她在麻省理工学院找到了一份程序员的工作，她的计划是支持她的丈夫在哈佛法学院工作三年

vocabulary.definition: n. 模拟器, 假装者；[计] 模拟器
vocabulary.context: One day, Lauren was playing with the MIT command module simulator's display-and-keyboard unit, nicknamed the DSKY (dis-key).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，劳伦正在摆弄麻省理工学院命令模块模拟器的显示和键盘单元，绰号为 DSKY（dis-key）

vocabulary.definition: n. 中心, 中央, 向心性；[医] 中央性, 归中性
vocabulary.context: But as the Apollo project unfolded, the centrality of software in accomplishing the mission started to become clear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但随着阿波罗计划的展开，软件在完成任务中的中心地位开始变得清晰

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可消除的, 可抹去的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该系统在其永久存储器（雷神公司工人穿的铜"绳子"）中存储了超过 12,000 个"单词"，在其临时可擦除存储器中存储了 1,024 个单词

vocabulary.definition: n. 主机；[电] 主机
vocabulary.context: For Hamilton, programming meant punching holes in stacks of punch cards, which would be processed overnight in batches on a giant Honeywell mainframe computer that simulated the Apollo lander's work.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于汉密尔顿来说，编程意味着在成堆的打孔卡上打孔，这些打孔卡将在模拟阿波罗登陆器工作的巨型霍尼韦尔大型计算机上过夜分批处理

vocabulary.definition: n. 喷气客机
vocabulary.context: As Mindell tells the story, it was the first computerized onboard navigation system designed to be operated by humans but with "fly-by-wire" autopilot technology - a precursor to the computerized navigation systems that are now standard on jetliners.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正如明德尔讲述的那样，它是第一个由人类操作的计算机化机载导航系统，但采用了"电传操纵"自动驾驶技术--这是现在喷气客机标配的计算机化导航系统的前身

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发射前的,下水前的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 劳伦在模拟器处于飞行途中时以某种方式启动了名为 P01 的预启动程序，导致模拟器崩溃

vocabulary.definition: n. 玩具, 小玩艺儿, 小型的东西, 消遣；adj. 供玩耍的, 作为玩具的；v.i. 玩弄, 戏弄, 调情

vocabulary.context: Also thanks to Hamilton and the work she led, notions of what humanity could do, and be, changed not just beyond the stratosphere but also here on the ground.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还要感谢汉密尔顿和她领导的工作，人类能够做什么和能够做什么的概念不仅在平流层之外而且在地面上发生了变化

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让母亲将崇高的荣誉和勇敢无私的情感注入到男孩温柔的灵魂中；正义、真理和仁慈......

vocabulary.context: ...for that is to be thrown away, but upon her weak, human declaration-we ask if the next generation of men growing up under this willful abandonment, are likely to be any more just, any more deferential to the sex, which leaves them in infancy and boyhood to the neglect of ignorant nurses, or to graduate through street companionship to...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...因为那是要被抛弃的，但根据她软弱的、人性的宣言--我们问，在这种故意遗弃下成长的下一代男人是否可能更加公正，对性别更加恭敬，这使他们在婴儿期和少年期受到无知护士的忽视，或者通过街头陪伴毕业......

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ......作为性别，那个女人必须离开摇篮边和育婴室入门书，以及所有神圣的家庭祭坛，进入角斗场，与她指定的监护人和指导者进行挑衅性的战斗，使他屈服于她的意志，承认她的权利，而不是基于福音权威，因为那是被抛弃的，......

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...宣言--我们问，在这种故意遗弃下成长的下一代男性是否可能会更加公正，更加尊重性别，这使得他们在婴儿期和少年期都受到无知护士的忽视，或者通过街头陪伴而成长为恶毒的男子气概？

vocabulary.definition: v. 军事化( militarize的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Following the invasion of the Soviet Union in June 1941, Einsatzgruppen (mobile killing units) and, later, militarized battalions of Order Police officials, moved behind German lines to carry out mass-murder operations against Jews, Roma, and Soviet state and Communist Party officials.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1941 年 6 月入侵苏联后，特别行动队（机动杀戮部队）以及后来的秩序警察军事化营，深入德国战线后方，对犹太人、罗姆人以及苏联国家和共产党官员实施大规模谋杀行动

vocabulary.definition: n. 安乐死；[医] 安死术
vocabulary.context: At least 200,000 mentally or physically disabled patients, mainly Germans, living in institutional settings, were murdered in the so-called Euthanasia Program.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 至少有 200,000 名生活在机构环境中的精神或身体残疾患者（主要是德国人）在所谓的安乐死计划中被谋杀

vocabulary.definition: n. 知识界
vocabulary.context: The Germans targeted the non-Jewish Polish intelligentsia for killing, and deported millions of Polish and Soviet civilians for forced labor in Germany or in occupied Poland, where these individuals worked and often died under deplorable conditions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 德国人针对非犹太波兰知识分子进行屠杀，并将数百万波兰和苏联平民驱逐到德国或被占领的波兰进行强迫劳动，这些人在那里工作并经常在悲惨的条件下死亡

vocabulary.definition: adj. 官僚的；[经] 机僚化的
vocabulary.context: The Holocaust was the systematic, bureaucratic, state-sponsored persecution and murder of six million Jews by Adolf Hitler and his Nazi regime.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大屠杀是阿道夫·希特勒及其纳粹政权对六百万犹太人进行的系统性、官僚性、国家支持的迫害和谋杀

vocabulary.definition: adj. 意识形态的, 空想的；[法] 思想的, 思想上的, 意识形态的
vocabulary.context: Other groups were persecuted on political, ideological, and behavioral grounds, among them Communists, Socialists, Jehovah's Witnesses, and homosexuals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他群体因政治、意识形态和行为原因而受到迫害，其中包括共产党人、社会主义者、耶和华见证人和同性恋者

vocabulary.definition: n. 营, 军队, 集团
vocabulary.context: Following the invasion of the Soviet Union in June 1941, Einsatzgruppen (mobile killing units) and, later, militarized battalions of Order Police officials, moved behind German lines to carry out mass-murder operations against Jews, Roma, and Soviet state and Communist Party officials.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1941 年 6 月入侵苏联后，特别行动队（机动杀戮部队）以及后来的秩序警察军事化营，深入德国战线后方，对犹太人、罗姆人以及苏联国家和共产党官员实施大规模谋杀行动

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使容易, 促进, 帮助；[法] 使容易, 使便利, 推进
vocabulary.context: To concentrate and monitor the Jewish population as well as to facilitate later deportation of the Jews, the Germans and their collaborators created ghettos, transit camps, and forced-labor camps in order to keep Jews grouped closely together during the war years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了集中和监视犹太人口以及便于后来驱逐犹太人，德国人和他们的合作者创建了贫民窟、中转营和强迫劳动营，以便在战争年代将犹太人紧密地聚集在一起

vocabulary.definition: n. 基准, 模范, 标准, 准则, 平均数；[化] 定额
vocabulary.context: From the earliest years of the Nazi regime, German authorities persecuted homosexuals and others whose behavior did not match prescribed social norms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从纳粹政权成立之初，德国当局就迫害同性恋者和其他行为不符合规定社会规范的人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可报告的, 值得报告的
vocabulary.context: ...persons, nor the portion paid to Senator Nixon, to reimburse him for office expenses, constituted income in a sense which was either reportable or taxable as income under income tax laws.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...人员，以及支付给尼克松参议员以偿还他的办公费用的部分，在某种意义上构成收入，根据所得税法作为收入应报告或应税

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非政治性的
vocabulary.context: I have made an average of approximately $1,500 a year from nonpolitical speaking engagements and lectures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我通过非政治演讲和讲座平均每年赚取约 1,500 美元

vocabulary.definition: v. 呸（藐视, 嘲笑）, 发呸声( pooh-pooh的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Stevenson, has pooh-poohed and ridiculed the Communist threat in the United States-he said that they are phantoms among ourselves, he has accused us that have attempted to expose the Communists, of looking for Communists in the Bureau of Fisheries and Wildlife-I say that a man who says that isn't qualified to be President of the United States.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 史蒂文森对美国的共产主义威胁嗤之以鼻，嘲笑他们是我们中间的幻影，他指责我们试图揭露共产党，在渔业和野生动物局寻找共产党，我说这样的人没有资格担任美国总统

vocabulary.definition: n. 速记, 速记法
vocabulary.context: She used to teach stenography and she used to teach shorthand in high school.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她曾经在高中教速记和速记

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可征税的, 应征税的；[经] 可征税的, 应纳税的
vocabulary.context: ...the portion paid to Senator Nixon, to reimburse him for office expenses, constituted income in a sense which was either reportable or taxable as income under income tax laws.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...支付给尼克松参议员的部分，用于偿还他的办公费用，在某种意义上构成收入，根据所得税法作为收入应报告或应税

vocabulary.definition: n. 支付, 支出；[经] 支付
vocabulary.context: It is our conclusion that Senator Nixon did not obtain any financial gain from the collection and disbursement of the funds by Dana Smith; that Senator Nixon did not violate any federal or state law by reason of the operation of the fund; and that neither the portion of the fund paid by Dana Smith directly to...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的结论是，尼克松参议员没有从达纳·史密斯收集和支付资金中获得任何经济利益；尼克松参议员并未因该基金的运作而违反任何联邦或州法律；达纳·史密斯直接支付给......的资金部分也没有

vocabulary.definition: n. 专栏作家
vocabulary.context: I'm going to tell you this: I remember in the dark days of the Hiss trial some of the same columnists, some of the same radio commentators who are attacking me now and misrepresenting my position, were violently opposing me at the time I was after Alger Hiss.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我要告诉你的是：我记得在希斯审判的黑暗日子里，一些专栏作家、一些广播评论员现在正在攻击我并歪曲我的立场，而当我追捕阿尔杰·希斯时，他们却猛烈地反对我

vocabulary.definition: n. 审计, 查帐；v.t. 查(帐), 旁听；v.i. 查账；[计] 查帐; 审查; 检查
vocabulary.context: Let me say, incidentally, that some of you may say, "Well, that is all right, Senator, that is your explanation, but have you got any proof?" And I would like to tell you this evening that just an hour ago we received an independent audit of this entire fund.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 顺便说一下，你们中的一些人可能会说："好吧，参议员，这就是你的解释，但是你有证据吗？"今晚我想告诉你们，就在一个小时前，我们收到了对整个基金的独立审计

vocabulary.definition: adj. 相关的, 中肯的, 切题的；[法] 恰当的, 有关的
vocabulary.context: I am proud to be able to report to you tonight that this audit and legal opinion is being forwarded to General Eisenhower and I would like to read to you the opinion that was prepared by Gibson, Dunn, & Crutcher, based on all the pertinent laws, and statutes, together with the audit report prepared by the certified public accountants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我很自豪今晚能够向您报告，这份审计和法律意见书已转交给艾森豪威尔将军，我想向您宣读吉布森、邓恩和克鲁彻根据所有相关法律和法规准备的意见，以及注册会计师准备的审计报告

vocabulary.definition: adj. 热核的, 热核武器的
vocabulary.context: I refuse to accept the cynical notion that nation after nation must spiral down a militaristic stairway into the hell of thermonuclear destruction.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我拒绝接受这样一种愤世嫉俗的观念，即一个又一个国家必须沿着军国主义的阶梯螺旋式下降，进入热核毁灭的地狱

vocabulary.definition: n. 传家宝, 动产继承物；[法] 祖传动产, 传家宝
vocabulary.context: I think Alfred Nobel would know what I mean when I say that I accept this award in the spirit of a curator of some precious heirloom which he holds in trust for its true owners - all those to whom beauty is truth and truth beauty - and in whose eyes the beauty of genuine brotherhood and peace is more precious than diamonds or silver or gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我想阿尔弗雷德·诺贝尔会明白我的意思，当我说我本着一位珍贵传家宝馆长的精神接受这个奖项时，他将这些传家宝托付给它的真正所有者--所有对美就是真理和真理美的人--在他们眼中，真正的兄弟情谊与和平之美比钻石、银或金更珍贵

vocabulary.definition: adj. 对立的, 正相反的
vocabulary.context: Civilization and violence are antithetical concepts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 文明与暴力是对立的概念

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没有星的, 没有星光的
vocabulary.context: I refuse to accept the view that mankind is so tragically bound to the starless midnight of racism and war that the bright daybreak of peace and brotherhood can never become a reality.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我拒绝接受这样一种观点，即人类悲惨地陷入了种族主义和战争的无星午夜，和平与兄弟情谊的光明黎明永远无法成为现实

vocabulary.definition: n. 投弃货物, 漂流到海岸的货物；[化] 沉料; 抛弃后沉底的货物(船过海滩减载措施)
vocabulary.context: I refuse to accept the idea that man is mere flotsam and jetsam in the river of life, unable to influence the unfolding events which surround him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我拒绝接受这样的观点，即人只是生命之河中的残骸和残骸，无法影响他周围正在发生的事件

vocabulary.definition: n. 悲歌, 哀歌, 挽歌
vocabulary.context: Sooner or later all the people of the world will have to discover a way to live together in peace, and thereby transform this pending cosmic elegy into a creative psalm of brotherhood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 全世界人民迟早必须找到一种和平共处的方式，从而将这首悬而未决的宇宙挽歌变成一首富有创意的兄弟情谊诗篇

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大胆的, 鲁莽的, 胆大妄为的
vocabulary.context: I accept this award today with an abiding faith in America and an audacious faith in the future of mankind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，我怀着对美国的坚定信念和对人类未来的大胆信念接受这一奖项

vocabulary.definition: n. 被动, 被动性, 无抵抗, 钝性, 被动结构；[化] 钝态
vocabulary.context: Negroes of the United States, following the people of India, have demonstrated that nonviolence is not sterile passivity, but a powerful moral force which makes for social transformation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 美国黑人效仿印度人民，已经证明非暴力不是毫无结果的消极态度，而是推动社会变革的强大道德力量

vocabulary.definition: adj. 扭曲的, 弯曲的, 转弯抹角的, 欺骗的；[医] 纡曲的, 弯曲的
vocabulary.context: The tortuous road which has led from Montgomery, Alabama to Oslo bears witness to this truth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从阿拉巴马州蒙哥马利到奥斯陆的曲折道路见证了这一真理

vocabulary.definition: v. 围攻（beleaguer的过去式和过去分词）；adj. 围困的；包围的
vocabulary.context: Therefore, I must ask why this prize is awarded to a movement which is beleaguered and committed to unrelenting struggle; to a movement which has not won the very peace and brotherhood which is the essence of the Nobel Prize.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，我必须问，为什么这个奖项颁给一个陷入困境并致力于不懈斗争的运动？这场运动并未赢得诺贝尔奖的本质--和平与兄弟情谊

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大陆间的, 洲际的
vocabulary.context: In Washington and in Moscow, we knew that we would have less than a half hour to respond after we learned that intercontinental missiles had been launched against us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在华盛顿和莫斯科，我们知道在得知针对我们发射洲际导弹后，我们将有不到半小时的时间做出反应

vocabulary.definition: n. 引起分歧, 导致分裂
vocabulary.context: The bond of our common humanity is stronger than the divisiveness of our fears and prejudices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们共同的人性的纽带比我们的恐惧和偏见的分裂更强大

vocabulary.definition: n. 估计错误；判断错误（等于misjudgement）
vocabulary.context: Both sides understood that an unresolved political altercation or a serious misjudgment could lead to a nuclear holocaust.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 双方都明白，未解决的政治争端或严重误判可能导致核浩劫

vocabulary.definition: n. 调解, 调停；adj. 调解的, 调停的
vocabulary.context: None has provided more vivid reminders of the dangers of peacemaking than two of my friends, Anwar Sadat and Yitzak Rabin, who gave their lives for the cause of peace in the Middle East.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没有人比我的两个朋友安瓦尔·萨达特和伊扎克·拉宾更生动地提醒我们缔造和平的危险，他们为中东和平事业献出了生命

vocabulary.definition: n. 配置, 分配, 拨给；[经] 分配, 拨款, 分摊
vocabulary.context: Our gross national economy exceeds that of the three countries that follow us, and our nation's voice most often prevails as decisions are made concerning trade, humanitarian assistance, and the allocation of global wealth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的国民经济总量超过了紧随其后的三个国家，在涉及贸易、人道主义援助和全球财富分配的决策时，我们国家的声音最占主导地位

vocabulary.definition: n. 同船水手
vocabulary.context: My shipmates and I realized that we had to be ready to fight if combat was forced upon us, and we were prepared to give our lives to defend our nation and its principles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我和我的船友们意识到，如果战斗强加于我们，我们必须做好战斗准备，我们准备献出生命来保卫我们的国家及其原则

vocabulary.definition: n. 弹头
vocabulary.context: They include: the abolition of land mines and chemical weapons; an end to the testing, proliferation, and further deployment of nuclear warheads; constraints on global warming; prohibition of the death penalty, at least for children; and an international criminal court to deter and to punish war crimes and genocide.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其中包括：废除地雷和化学武器；停止核弹头的试验、扩散和进一步部署；对全球变暖的限制；禁止死刑，至少对儿童禁止；以及一个国际刑事法院，以威慑和惩罚战争罪和种族灭绝罪

vocabulary.definition: n. 警告, 劝告, 训诫；[法] 警告, 申戒, 劝告
vocabulary.context: I thought often during my years in the White House of an admonition that we received in our small school in Plains, Georgia, from a beloved teacher, Miss Julia Coleman.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在白宫任职期间，我经常想起我们在佐治亚州普莱恩斯的一所小学校里收到的一位受人爱戴的老师朱莉娅·科尔曼小姐的警告

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可感知的, 可评估的
vocabulary.context: We have not yet made the commitment to share with others an appreciable part of our excessive wealth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们尚未承诺与他人分享我们过剩财富中的很大一部分

vocabulary.definition: n. 不受惩罚, 无事, 无患；[法] 不受刑罚, 免罚, 免罪
vocabulary.context: From a great distance, we launch bombs or missiles with almost total impunity, and never want to know the number or identity of the victims.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们从很远的距离发射炸弹或导弹，几乎完全不受惩罚，而且从来不想知道受害者的人数或身份

vocabulary.definition: adv. 语言学方面
vocabulary.context: Eliot called it "the first step that American fiction has taken since Henry James." Lionel Trilling thought Fitzgerald had achieved in it "the ideal voice of the novelist." That's the received Gatsby : a linguistically elegant, intellectually bold, morally acute parable of our nation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾略特称其为"自亨利·詹姆斯以来美国小说迈出的第一步"。莱昂内尔·特里林认为菲茨杰拉德在其中实现了"小说家的理想声音"。这就是广为人知的盖茨比：一个关于我们国家的语言优雅、思想大胆、道德敏锐的寓言

vocabulary.definition: n. 复发, 再发作, 再爆发；[医] [短期后]复发(几日或几星期后)
vocabulary.context: So since we find ourselves, as we cyclically do here, in the middle of another massive Gatsby ­recrudescence, allow me to file a minority report.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，既然我们发现自己正处于另一次大规模的盖茨比卷土重来之中，正如我们在这里周期性地所做的那样，请允许我提交一份少数派报告

vocabulary.definition: adj. 受过完善训练的, 彻底的
vocabulary.context: I am in thoroughgoing disagreement with all of this.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我完全不同意所有这些

vocabulary.definition: adv. 美学观点上地；审美地
vocabulary.context: I find Gatsby aesthetically overrated, psychologically vacant, and morally complacent; I think we kid ourselves about the lessons it contains.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我发现盖茨比在美学上被高估了，在心理上空虚，在道德上自满。我认为我们在它所包含的教训上自欺欺人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 过份地, 卓越地
vocabulary.context: Fitzgerald fails at that, most egregiously where it most matters: in the relationship between Daisy and Gatsby.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 菲茨杰拉德在这方面失败了，最令人震惊的是在最重要的地方：黛西和盖茨比之间的关系

vocabulary.definition: n. 权宜, 方便, 私利
vocabulary.context: This he constructs out of one part nostalgia, four parts narrative expedience, and zero parts anything else - love, sex, desire, any kind of palpable connection.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用一部分怀旧、四部分叙事权宜之计和零部分其他任何东西--爱、性、欲望、任何一种明显的联系--构建了这一点

vocabulary.definition: n. 污名, 耻辱, 咒骂；[法] 轻蔑, 责骂, 不名誉
vocabulary.context: We are all up above it, watching - with prurient fascination, with pious opprobrium, watching and watching and doing nothing at all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们都在它之上，看着--带着淫荡的迷恋，带着虔诚的责备，看着又看着，却什么也不做

vocabulary.definition: n. 结局, 终场
vocabulary.context: Gatsby takes place over a single summer: three months, three acts, three chapters each, with a denouement - the car accident and murder - of near-Greek (but also near-silly) symmetry.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 盖茨比的故事发生在一个夏天：三个月，三幕，每幕三章，结局--车祸和谋杀--近乎希腊式（但也近乎愚蠢）对称

vocabulary.definition: n. 冷漠；高傲；超然离群
vocabulary.context: In fact, it offers the opposite: aloofness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，它提供了相反的东西：冷漠

vocabulary.definition: adj. 教师的, 教学法的, 适宜于教师的
vocabulary.context: It is, among other things, a pedagogical perennial, in part for obvious reasons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除其他外，它是一种多年生的教育学，部分原因是显而易见的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多项选择的
vocabulary.context: The interview is multiple-choice: Do I have anything, such as child care problems, that might make it hard for me to get to work on time?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 面试是多项选择题：我是否有什么问题，比如照顾孩子的问题，可能会让我难以按时上班？

vocabulary.definition: n. 观光, 游览；adj. 观光的, 游览的
vocabulary.context: Then it's off for a round of the locally owned inns and guest houses in Key West's Old Town, which is where all the serious sightseeing and guzzling goes on, a couple of miles removed from the functional end of the island, where the discount hotels make their homes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后前往基韦斯特老城区参观当地人拥有的旅馆和宾馆，那里是所有严肃观光和消费的场所，距离岛的功能区几英里，那里是折扣酒店的所在地

vocabulary.definition: n. 修理工
vocabulary.context: I hate the drive, along a roadside studded with white crosses commemorating the more effective head-on collisions, but it's a sweet little place - a cabin, more or less, set in the swampy backyard of the converted mobile home where my landlord, an affable TV repairman, lives with his bartender girlfriend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我讨厌开车，路边布满了白色十字架，纪念更有效的正面碰撞，但这是一个可爱的小地方--一间小屋，或多或少，坐落在改装的移动房屋的沼泽后院里，我的房东，一位和蔼可亲的电视修理工，和他的调酒师女朋友住在一起

vocabulary.definition: adv. 以前, 往昔地；adj. 以前的, 往昔的
vocabulary.context: I am terrified, especially at the beginning, of being recognized by some friendly business owner or erstwhile neighbor and having to stammer out some explanation of my project.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我很害怕，尤其是在开始的时候，害怕被一些友好的企业主或以前的邻居认出，并且不得不结结巴巴地解释我的项目

vocabulary.definition: adj. [美国口语]倦极的，累得腰酸背疼的，精疲力尽的
vocabulary.context: Waitressing is also something I'd like to avoid, because I remember it leaving me bone-tired when I was eighteen, and I'm decades of varicosities and back pain beyond that now.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当服务员也是我想避免的事情，因为我记得当我十八岁时，它让我筋疲力尽，而且现在我已经经历了几十年的静脉曲张和背痛

vocabulary.definition: n. 过食, 过度, 恶心；v.t. 使厌腻, 使沉溺于；v.i. 饮食过度
vocabulary.context: I lunch at Wendy's, where $4.99 gets you unlimited refills at the Mexican part of the Super-bar, a comforting surfeit of refried beans and cheese sauce.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我在 Wendy's 吃午饭，花 4.99 美元就可以在超级酒吧的墨西哥区无限续杯，享用令人心旷神怡的炸豆泥和奶酪酱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未说出口的,没有用言词表达的,不吭声的
vocabulary.context: Happily, though, my fears turn out to be entirely unwarranted: during a month of poverty and toil, no one recognizes my face or my name, which goes unnoticed and for the most part unuttered.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不过，令人高兴的是，我的担心被证明是完全没有根据的：在贫困和辛劳的一个月里，没有人认出我的脸或我的名字，这些都没有被注意到，而且在很大程度上没有被提及

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可做的, 切实可行的
vocabulary.context: I figure that if I can earn $7 an hour - which, from the want ads, seems doable - I can afford to spend $500 on rent or maybe, with severe economies, $600 and still have $400 or $500 left over for food and gas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我认为，如果我每小时能赚 7 美元--从招聘广告来看，这似乎是可行的--我可以负担得起 500 美元的租金，或者在经济形势严峻的情况下，花 600 美元，而且还剩下 400 美元或 500 美元用于食品和天然气

vocabulary.definition: n. a. (一种德国品种的)多伯曼短毛猎犬；[网络] 平犬类；品犬；宾舍尔犬
vocabulary.context: In the Key West area, this pretty much confines me to flophouses and trailer homes - like the one, a pleasing fifteen-minute drive from town, that has no air-conditioning, no screens, no fans, no television, and, by way of diversion, only the challenge of evading the landlord's Doberman pinscher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在基韦斯特地区，这几乎把我限制在廉价旅馆和拖车屋里--就像那种距离城镇十五分钟车程的令人愉快的房子，没有空调，没有屏幕，没有风扇，没有电视，作为消遣，只有躲避房东的杜宾犬的挑战

vocabulary.definition: adj. 宫殿似的, 宏伟的, 堂皇的, 庄严的
vocabulary.context: At my last stop, a palatial B & B, I wait twenty minutes to meet "Max," only to be told that there are no jobs now but there should be one soon, since "nobody lasts more than a couple weeks."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我的最后一站，一家富丽堂皇的住宿加早餐旅馆，我等了二十分钟才见到"麦克斯"，却被告知现在没有工作，但很快就会有工作，因为"没有人能坚持超过几周"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 勤勉的, 刻苦的
vocabulary.context: 'Tis Joy to see the human Blossoms blow, When infant Reason grows apace, and calls For the kind Hand of an assiduous Care; Delightful Task!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当婴儿的理性迅速成长，并呼唤勤奋关怀的仁慈之手时，看到人类的花朵盛开是喜悦；令人愉快的任务！

vocabulary.definition: adv. 节约地, 俭朴地
vocabulary.context: That the boarding Scholars diet together, plainly, temperately, and frugally.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主张寄宿士人饮食一致，朴实、节制、节俭

vocabulary.definition: adv. 适度地；有节制地
vocabulary.context: That the boarding Scholars diet together, plainly, temperately, and frugally.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主张寄宿士人饮食一致，朴实、节制、节俭

vocabulary.definition: n. 曲调, 歌曲, 评论；v.i. 评论, 唱歌
vocabulary.context: MORALITY, by descanting and making continual Observations on the Causes of the Rise or Fall of any Man's Character, Fortune, Power, &c .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 道德，通过对任何人的品格、财富、权力等的兴衰原因进行持续观察

vocabulary.definition: adv. 快速地, 急速地
vocabulary.context: 'Tis Joy to see the human Blossoms blow, When infant Reason grows apace, and calls For the kind Hand of an assiduous Care; Delightful Task!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当婴儿的理性迅速成长，并呼唤勤奋关怀的仁慈之手时，看到人类的花朵盛开是喜悦；令人愉快的任务！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 简洁的, 简明的
vocabulary.context: should be Classicks: The Stiles principally to be cultivated, being the clear and the concise .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 应该是Classics：Stiles主要是要修养，清晰简洁

vocabulary.definition: n. 发音, 读法
vocabulary.context: To form their Pronunciation, they may be put on making Declamations, repeating Speeches, delivering Orations, &c.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了形成他们的发音，他们可能会被要求发表宣言、重复演讲、发表演讲等

vocabulary.definition: n. 墙两边的阶梯
vocabulary.context: To form their Stile, they should be put on Writing Letters to each other, making Abstracts of what they read; or writing the same Things in their own Words; telling or writing Stories lately read, in their own Expressions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了形成他们的阶梯，他们应该互相写信，对他们所读到的内容进行摘要；或者用他们自己的话写下同样的事情；用自己的表达方式讲述或写最近读过的故事

vocabulary.definition: adv. 强调地, 着重地
vocabulary.context: Reading should also be taught, and pronouncing, properly, distinctly, emphatically; not with an even Tone, which under-does , nor a theatrical, which over-does Nature.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还应该教授阅读和发音，正确、清晰、强调；不是用平淡的语气来表现自然，也不是用戏剧性的语气来表现自然

vocabulary.definition: adj. 两种人种的
vocabulary.context: I hear Carey's singing - a mixture of gospel, jazz and pop - as an expression of her mixed identity as a biracial woman with an immigrant Afro-Venezuelan, Irish American heritage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听到凯莉的歌声混合了福音、爵士乐和流行音乐，表达了她作为一名混血女性与非裔委内瑞拉移民、爱尔兰裔美国血统的混血女性的混合身份

vocabulary.definition: adj. 中间的；n. 中间物, 中间人, 中间存在者
vocabulary.context: If all of us, the people of the in-between spaces at the show, could lift our voices to the heavens as Mariah Carey did in the arena that night, maybe we could be heard, be seen, be understood, be valued in this country as we value her.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们所有人，即演出中间空间的人们，都能像玛丽亚·凯莉那天晚上在舞台上所做的那样，向天空发出我们的声音，也许我们可以在这个国家被听到、被看到、被理解、被重视，就像我们重视她一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 短剑, 钻孔锥；[电] 机载探测地面雷达电子系统
vocabulary.context: She glided across the stage wearing a tiara and a sparkling silver and white ball gown with a tight bodice, splits up to her thighs, and open-toed stilettos.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她头戴王冠，穿着闪亮的银白色舞会礼服，上身开衩至大腿，脚踩露趾细高跟鞋，在舞台上滑行

vocabulary.definition: n. 缉查毒品的刑警
vocabulary.context: and homegrown racism, narco wars and the recent invasion, I found in Carey's hit song the kind of joy one could seemingly derive only from being successful in the United States.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以及本土的种族主义、毒品战争和最近的入侵，我在凯里的热门歌曲中发现了一种似乎只有在美国取得成功才能获得的快乐

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自家种植的, 国产的
vocabulary.context: and homegrown racism, narco wars and the recent invasion, I found in Carey's hit song the kind of joy one could seemingly derive only from being successful in the United States.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以及本土的种族主义、毒品战争和最近的入侵，我在凯里的热门歌曲中发现了一种似乎只有在美国取得成功才能获得的快乐

vocabulary.definition: adj. [眼科]近视的；目光短浅的
vocabulary.context: It was miserable straining to see and present my identity through a myopic lens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过近视镜头来看待和呈现我的身份是一种痛苦的努力

vocabulary.definition: n. 无尾礼服, 男小礼服
vocabulary.context: Carey was then escorted off the snowflake by dancers wearing white tuxedos and top hats to a cheering crowd.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后，凯莉在身穿白色燕尾服、头戴礼帽的舞者的护送下，走向欢呼的人群

vocabulary.definition: adv. 音乐上

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从东方到西方的哲学，无尽的痛苦和不幸都是生命的首要主题

vocabulary.definition: v. 反刍, 沉思

vocabulary.definition: n. 荒诞主义者
vocabulary.context: It would be easy to conclude that an absurdist view of life rules out happiness and leads anyone with any sense to despair at her very existence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很容易得出这样的结论：荒诞主义的人生观排除了幸福，并导致任何有理智的人对她的存在感到绝望

vocabulary.definition: adj. 安静的, 镇定的
vocabulary.context: And yet in his book, Camus concludes, "One must imagine Sisyphus happy." This may seem impossible, but in fact, this unexpected twist in Camus' philosophy of life and happiness can help you change your perspective and see your daily struggles in a new, more equanimous way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，加缪在他的书中总结道："人们必须想象西西弗斯是幸福的。"这似乎不可能，但事实上，加缪的生活和幸福哲学的这种意想不到的转变可以帮助你改变你的观点，并以一种新的、更平静的方式看待你每天的挣扎

vocabulary.definition: n. 庄严, 可怕, 虔敬

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凭借他的荒诞主义观点，你可能会认为加缪会赞同这种生活自然的可怕性的观点

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马萨诸塞州普通法院撤销了有罪判决，甚至向受害者家属提供了赔偿

vocabulary.definition: n. 长处, 特长, 拿手, 优点
vocabulary.context: One suspect was subjected to peine forte et dure , a form of torture in which he was pressed beneath an increasingly heavy load of stones to make him enter a plea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名嫌疑人遭受了"peine forte et dure"酷刑，这是一种酷刑，他被压在越来越重的石头下，迫使他认罪

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可设计的, 可编程的
vocabulary.context: Devol's invention of a digitally operated programmable robotic arm triggered an explosive change in the manufacturing industry - a change that, like the introduction of mechanized spindle rods and textile frames of the 1800s, has replaced tens of thousands of workers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Devol 发明的数字操作可编程机械臂引发了制造业的爆炸性变化 - 这一变化就像 1800 年代机械化主轴杆和纺织框架的引入一样，已经取代了数万名工人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 暂时的, 短暂的, 昙花一现的；[法] 临时性诉讼, 可选择管辖区的诉讼; 临时的, 过渡的
vocabulary.context: The Luddites were part of one of the most transitory labor movements in history, but they taught us an important lesson that is still valid: the cure for problems caused by innovation is not revolution, but more innovation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 勒德分子是历史上最短暂的劳工运动之一的一部分，但他们给我们上了一个仍然有效的重要教训：解决创新引起的问题的方法不是革命，而是更多的创新

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 胜过；做得比……好
vocabulary.context: The new factories, which vastly outperformed the traditional, manual production process, lowered the prices of consumer goods and other products, multiplied their variety, and made them available to far more people than ever before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 新工厂的性能大大优于传统的手工生产工艺，降低了消费品和其他产品的价格，增加了它们的品种，并为比以往任何时候都多得多的人提供了产品

vocabulary.definition: n. 去年, 不久以前；adv. 过去不久的岁月
vocabulary.context: Statistics show that those low-level starting jobs of yesteryear are increasingly performed by robots.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 统计数据显示，过去那些低水平的起始工作越来越多地由机器人来完成

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 改革, 创新
vocabulary.context: But the unstoppable drive to innovate will no doubt bring dramatic changes and new challenges.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但不可阻挡的创新动力无疑会带来巨大的变化和新的挑战

vocabulary.definition: n. 信条
vocabulary.context: Buckley's, Jr., description of his own conservative credo, the Luddites tried to "stand in front of history, and shout 'Stop!'"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小巴克利在描述他自己的保守主义信条时，勒德分子试图"站在历史面前，大喊'停止！'"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 远洋航行的
vocabulary.context: The new and fast-coming inventions gave the world the first steam-powered railways, boats, and ocean-going ships; large-scale manufacture of machine tools; and novel machinery in steam-powered plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 快速出现的新发明为世界带来了第一条蒸汽动力铁路、轮船和远洋轮船；大型机床制造；以及蒸汽动力工厂中的新型机械

vocabulary.definition: n. 纱锭, 纺锤, 轴, 心轴；v.i. 变细长；v.t. 装锭子于；adj. 像锭子的
vocabulary.context: Devol's invention of a digitally operated programmable robotic arm triggered an explosive change in the manufacturing industry - a change that, like the introduction of mechanized spindle rods and textile frames of the 1800s, has replaced tens of thousands of workers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Devol 发明的数字操作可编程机械臂引发了制造业的爆炸性变化 - 这一变化就像 1800 年代机械化主轴杆和纺织框架的引入一样，已经取代了数万名工人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 痛苦的, 严重的, 充满悲伤的；[法] 极大的, 严重的, 惨无人道的
vocabulary.context: The administration of President Franklin Delano Roosevelt enacted the Social Security Act and other frequently strengthened social welfare measures, collectively referred to as "The New Deal." To this day, they continue to protect millions of Americans against the most grievous effects of disease and unemployment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 富兰克林·德拉诺·罗斯福总统的政府颁布了《社会保障法》和其他经常强化的社会福利措施，统称为"新政"。直到今天，他们仍在继续保护数百万美国人免受疾病和失业最严重的影响

vocabulary.definition: n. 旋风
vocabulary.context: This sea change, which started 60 years ago, continues to generate a whirlwind of still more labor- and cost-saving innovations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这场始于 60 年前的巨变，继续掀起更多节省劳动力和成本的创新旋风

vocabulary.definition: adv. 句法上
vocabulary.context: The linguistic fluency of any good translator tells them that, syntactically, " Aujourd'hui, maman est morte, " is not the most fluid English sentence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 任何优秀译者的语言流畅性都告诉他们，从句法上来说，"Aujourd'hui, maman est morte"并不是最流畅的英语句子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人厌恶的; 老是推托的
vocabulary.context: ...nor the overly childlike "mommy." In English, "mom" might seem the closest fit for Camus's sentence, but there's still something off-putting and abrupt about the single-syllable word; the two-syllable maman has a touch of softness and warmth that is lost with "mom."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...也不是过于孩子气的"妈妈"。在英语中，"妈妈"似乎最适合加缪的句子，但这个单音节词仍然有一些令人反感和唐突的地方；这个两个音节的妈妈带有一丝柔软和温暖，而"妈妈"则失去了这一点

vocabulary.definition: adj. 语义的；[计] 语义
vocabulary.context: Writing of "The Stranger"'s first line in the Guardian , Guy Dammann says, "Some openers are so prescient that they seem to burn a hole through the rest of the book, the semantic resonance recurring with the persistence of the first theme in Beethoven's fifth symphony."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 盖伊·达曼（Guy Dammann）在《卫报》上撰写《局外人》的第一行时说："有些开场白是如此有先见之明，以至于它们似乎在本书的其余部分中烧出了一个洞，语义共鸣随着贝多芬第五交响曲第一主题的持续存在而反复出现。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 句法, 语法, 句子构造；[计] 句法, 语法
vocabulary.context: But the question is: In changing the sentence's syntax, are we also changing its logic, its "mystical" deeper meaning?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但问题是：在改变句子的语法的同时，我们是否也在改变它的逻辑，它的"神秘"的更深层次的含义？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 预想的, 先入为主的
vocabulary.context: Finally, and perhaps most important, the American reader will harbor no preconceived notions of the word maman.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，也许也是最重要的一点是，美国读者不会对"maman"这个词抱有任何先入为主的观念

vocabulary.definition: adv. 冷酷地；无情地
vocabulary.context: This loss drives the action of the novel, leading inexorably to the end, the final period, the thing that hangs over all else: death.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种损失推动了小说的情节，无情地通向结局，最后的时期，笼罩在一切之上的事情：死亡

vocabulary.definition: adj. 预知的, 有先见之明的
vocabulary.context: Writing of "The Stranger"'s first line in the Guardian , Guy Dammann says, "Some openers are so prescient that they seem to burn a hole through the rest of the book, the semantic resonance recurring with the persistence of the first theme in Beethoven's fifth symphony."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 盖伊·达曼（Guy Dammann）在《卫报》上撰写《局外人》的第一行时说："有些开场白是如此有先见之明，以至于它们似乎在本书的其余部分中烧出了一个洞，语义共鸣随着贝多芬第五交响曲第一主题的持续存在而反复出现。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 简洁的, 紧缩的
vocabulary.context: In 1946, Gilbert translated the book's title as "The Outsider" and rendered the first line as "Mother died today." Simple, succinct, and incorrect.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1946年，吉尔伯特将书名翻译为《局外人》，并将第一行译为"母亲今天去世了"。简单、简洁且不正确

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 从语法上分析；[计] 分列
vocabulary.context: First, the French word maman is familiar enough for an English-language reader to parse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 首先，法语单词"maman"对于英语读者来说足够熟悉，可以解析

vocabulary.definition: n. 男学生
vocabulary.context: For the modern American reader, few lines in French literature are as famous as the opening of Albert Camus's "L'Étranger": " Aujourd'hui, maman est morte ." Nitty-gritty tense issues aside, the first sentence of "The Stranger" is so elementary that even a schoolboy with a base knowledge of French could adequately translate it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于现代美国读者来说，法国文学中很少有几行像阿尔贝·加缪的《陌生人》的开头那样著名："Aujourd'hui，maman est morte"。抛开具体的紧张问题不谈，《陌生人》的第一句话是如此简单，即使是有一点法语基础的小学生也能充分翻译它

vocabulary.definition: n. 月光, 月出时分

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 月出

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 四轮驱动

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 均匀地呈现温暖、精致的设计

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 日出有多充实

vocabulary.context: Tonight as the bright moon fills the bed, I am certain that I can't rise

vocabulary.definition: n. 骑士身分, 骑士气质, 骑士
vocabulary.context: Aye, there have been generations of Sir Johns among you, and if knighthood were hereditary, like a baronetcy, as it practically was in old times, when men were knighted from father to son, you would be Sir John now."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 是的，你们中间有几代约翰爵士，如果爵位是世袭的，就像过去的男爵爵位一样，人们从父亲到儿子都被封为爵士，那么您现在就是约翰爵士了。"

vocabulary.context: I am Parson Tringham, the antiquary, of Stagfoot Lane.

vocabulary.definition: n. 准男爵爵位
vocabulary.context: Aye, there have been generations of Sir Johns among you, and if knighthood were hereditary, like a baronetcy, as it practically was in old times, when men were knighted from father to son, you would be Sir John now."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 是的，你们中间有几代约翰爵士，如果爵位是世袭的，就像过去的男爵爵位一样，人们从父亲到儿子都被封为爵士，那么您现在就是约翰爵士了。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 直系的, 正统的, 嫡出的；[法] 直系的, 世袭的, 继承的
vocabulary.context: Don't you really know, Durbeyfield, that you are the lineal representative of the ancient and knightly family of the d'Urbervilles, who derive their descent from Sir Pagan d'Urberville, that renowned knight who came from Normandy with William the Conqueror, as appears by Battle Abbey Roll?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 德北菲尔德，你真的不知道你是德伯维尔家族古老骑士家族的直系代表吗？正如《战斗修道院卷》中所显示的那样，德伯维尔家族的血统源自帕甘·德伯维尔爵士，这位著名的骑士与征服者威廉一起来自诺曼底？"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在前；prep. 在...前
vocabulary.context: "Well, I have heard once or twice, 'tis true, that my family had seen better days afore they came to Blackmoor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "嗯，我听说过一两次，这是真的，我的家人在来到布莱克莫尔之前过着更好的日子

vocabulary.definition: n. 很会砍价的人
vocabulary.context: "Then what might your meaning be in calling me 'Sir John' these different times, when I be plain Jack Durbeyfield, the haggler?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "那么，当我只是讨价还价的杰克·德北菲尔德时，你在不同的时候称呼我'约翰爵士'可能是什么意思呢？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 运货车, 四轮运货马车, (英)铁路货车, 流动服务车, 小型客车, 囚车, 童车
vocabulary.context: His own investigations had begun on a day in the preceding spring when, having been engaged in tracing the vicissitudes of the d'Urberville family, he had observed Durbeyfield's name on his waggon, and had thereupon been led to make inquiries about his father and grandfather till he had no doubt on the subject.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他自己的调查是在去年春天的一天开始的，当时他正在追踪德伯维尔家族的变迁，他在马车上看到了德伯菲尔德的名字，于是他被引导去询问他的父亲和祖父，直到他对这个问题没有任何怀疑为止

vocabulary.definition: n. 血统, 家谱, 名门世系；[法] 家系, 出身, 血统
vocabulary.context: "It was only my whim," he said; and, after a moment's hesitation: "It was on account of a discovery I made some little time ago, whilst I was hunting up pedigrees for the new county history.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这只是我的一时兴起，"他说；犹豫片刻后说道："这是因为不久前我在为新的县历史寻找谱系时做出的一项发现

vocabulary.definition: n. 伐木者, 伐木机, 平缝工, 平缝装置, 接缝工, (非正式)伙伴, (非正式)家伙
vocabulary.context: "And here have I been knocking about, year after year, from pillar to post, as if I was no more than the commonest feller in the parish...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我年复一年地在这里从一个柱子到另一个柱子上徘徊，好像我只不过是教区里最普通的人......

vocabulary.definition: n. 教区牧师

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久，一位年长的牧师跨骑着一匹灰色母马迎接他，他一边骑着，一边哼着一首流浪的曲调

vocabulary.definition: n. 商船, 商人；[经] 远洋或沿海客货轮
vocabulary.context: This letter will reach England by a merchantman now on its homeward voyage from Archangel; more fortunate than I, who may not see my native land, perhaps, for many years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这封信将由一艘正在从大天使岛返航的商船到达英国；比我幸运，也许很多年都见不到我的祖国了

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 更新, 革新, 刷新, 修复, 使恢复活力
vocabulary.context: We have already reached a very high latitude; but it is the height of summer, and although not so warm as in England, the southern gales, which blow us speedily towards those shores which I so ardently desire to attain, breathe a degree of renovating warmth which I had not expected.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们已经到达了很高的纬度；但现在正值盛夏，虽然不像英国那样温暖，但南方的大风将我们迅速吹向我热切渴望到达的海岸，带来了我始料未及的令人耳目一新的温暖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不合格的, 无资格的, 不胜任的；[经] 无条件的, 不合格的, 无资格的
vocabulary.context: This appearance excited our unqualified wonder.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这一出现激发了我们无限的惊奇

vocabulary.context: We perceived a low carriage, fixed on a sledge and drawn by dogs, pass on towards the north, at the distance of half a mile; a being which had the shape of a man, but apparently of gigantic stature, sat in the sledge and guided the dogs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们看到一辆低矮的马车，固定在雪橇上，由狗拉着，向北行驶，距离半英里；一个人形的存在，但显然身材巨大，坐在雪橇上引导着狗

vocabulary.definition: adv. 轻率地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们已经到达了很高的纬度；但现在正值盛夏，虽然不像英国那样温暖，但南方的大风将我们迅速吹向我热切渴望到达的海岸，带来了我始料未及的令人耳目一新的温暖

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们已经到达了很高的纬度；但现在正值盛夏，虽然不像英国那样温暖，但南方的大风将我们迅速吹向我热切渴望到达的海岸，带来了我始料未及的令人耳目一新的温暖

vocabulary.context: For low-income households, such high cost burdens leave little left over for other necessities like food and healthcare." Meanwhile, in addition to the 28 million Americans who are uninsured, approximately 41 million people are underinsured, meaning their insurance does not adequately cover the cost of their healthcare.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于低收入家庭来说，如此高的成本负担几乎没有剩下多少钱来购买食品和医疗保健等其他必需品。"与此同时，除了 2800 万没有保险的美国人之外，大约 4100 万人保险不足，这意味着他们的保险不足以支付他们的医疗费用

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们之所以陷入无能为力的境地，并不是因为我们唯一强大的潜在敌人派人入侵我们的海岸，而是因为那些受到这个国家如此友善对待的人的叛国行为

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 并发, 伴随产生, 意外发生, 附带发生；[医] 附加, 并发
vocabulary.context: And before that end supervenes, a series of frightful collisions between the Soviet Republic and the bourgeois states will be inevitable."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个结局到来之前，苏维埃共和国和资产阶级国家之间一系列可怕的冲突将是不可避免的。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 隆隆声, 辘辘声

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，我们几乎可以亲耳听到一位充满活力的战神的低语和隆隆声

vocabulary.definition: adv. 显而易见地; 耀目地, 显目地

vocabulary.definition: n. 无神论

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爱炫耀的, 虚夸的, 盛大的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当这位穿着条纹裤、带着假英国口音的浮夸外交官向美国人民宣称山上基督支持共产主义、叛国罪、背叛神圣托付时，亵渎之词如此之大，唤醒了美国人民潜藏的愤慨

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无神论的, 无神论者的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有谁没有意识到共产主义世界已经说过："现在是时候了"--这是民主基督教世界和共产主义无神论世界之间摊牌的时间？

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，景观本身与世界一样古老。新颖之处在于看到整个民族都提供了它的例证

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...他在屋顶盖好之前就把它卖掉了；他建造了一座花园，并在树木即将结果时将其租用。他开垦一块田地，留下其他人去收割庄稼；他拥抱一个职业又放弃它；他在一个地方定居下来，不久之后他就离开这个地方，带着他多变的渴望到别处去

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无边的, 无限的, 无节制的
vocabulary.context: When all the privileges of birth and fortune are abolished, when all professions are accessible to all, and a man's own energies may place him at the top of any one of them, an easy and unbounded career seems open to his ambition and he will readily persuade himself that he is born to no common destinies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当所有出身和财富的特权都被废除，当所有的职业对所有人来说都是可以从事的，并且一个人自己的精力可以使他处于其中任何一个职业的顶端时，一种轻松而无限的职业似乎对他的野心开放，他很容易说服自己，他生来没有共同的命运

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 生命短暂的回忆始终激励着他

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自由的( free的最高级 ); 免费的; 空闲的; 摆脱…的
vocabulary.context: In America I saw the freest and most enlightened men placed in the happiest circumstances that the world affords, it seemed to me as if a cloud habitually hung upon their brow, and I thought them serious and almost sad, even in their pleasures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在美国，我看到最自由、最开明的人生活在世界上最幸福的环境中，在我看来，他们的额头上似乎习惯性地挂着一朵云，我认为他们严肃，几乎悲伤，即使在他们的快乐中也是如此

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不知足的, 贪求无厌的；[医] 不能满足的, 不饱的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...保证合适的就业和"安全卫生的住房"，对每个申请人进行不必要的复杂调查，以及来自个人移民的繁重报告。"在接近尾声时，杜鲁门对"国会认为适合施加如此吝啬的条件"表示遗憾，并让立法者注意他已经签署了该法案......

vocabulary.definition: n. 整体经济

vocabulary.context: All Members shall give the United Nations every assistance in any action it takes in accordance with the present Charter, and shall refrain from giving assistance to any state against which the United Nations is taking preventive or enforcement action.

vocabulary.definition: n. 一车的载量, 大量

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 容量（名词）某物所能容纳的最大数量，一车车装满后，将其与新鲜的肉一起倒入料斗中，并发送给公众的早餐

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无数的, 没有数过的
vocabulary.context: There would be meat that had tumbled out on the floor, in the dirt and sawdust, where the workers had tramped and spit uncounted billions of consumption germs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 会有肉掉在地板上、泥土和锯末中，工人们在那里踩踏并吐出无数的食用细菌

vocabulary.definition: n. 甘油, 丙三醇；[医] 甘油, 丙三醇
vocabulary.context: There was never the least attention paid to what was cut up for sausage; there would come all the way back from Europe old sausage that had been rejected, and that was moldy and white - it would be dosed with borax and glycerin, and dumped into the hoppers, and made over again for home consumption.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 香肠的切块从来没有受到过丝毫关注。那些从欧洲回来的被拒绝的旧香肠，已经发霉了，呈白色--它们会被添加硼砂和甘油，然后倒入料斗中，然后重新制作以供家庭消费

vocabulary.definition: n. 骗取, 欺诈, 骗局；v. 骗取, 诈取

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名成员在罐头厂修剪牛肉，另一名成员在香肠工厂工作，这家人对包装镇的绝大多数诈骗案都有第一手的了解

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无骨的
vocabulary.context: The packers were always originating such schemes-they had what they called "boneless hams," which were all the odds and ends of pork stuffed into casings; and "California hams," which were the shoulders, with big knuckle joints, and nearly all the meat cut out; and fancy "skinned hams,"...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 包装工总是发起这样的计划--他们有所谓的"无骨火腿"，这是把猪肉的所有碎屑塞进肠衣里；还有"加州火腿"，指的是肩部，关节很大，几乎所有的肉都被切掉了。还有精美的"去皮火腿"......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 白热的, 极热的, 白热化的
vocabulary.context: Formerly these had been sold as "Number Three Grade," but later on some ingenious person had hit upon a new device, and now they would extract the bone, about which the bad part generally lay, and insert in the hole a white-hot iron.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以前这些都是以"三级"的名义出售的，但后来一些聪明人想出了一种新装置，现在他们将坏掉的骨头拔出来，然后在孔中插入白热化的铁

vocabulary.definition: n. 包装工人, 罐头食品工人, 打包机, 搬家工人, 批发商, 罐头食品厂经理；[化] 包装机; 打包机
vocabulary.context: To pump into these the packers had a second and much stronger pickle which destroyed the odor-a process known to the workers as "giving them thirty per cent." Also, after the hams had been smoked, there would be found some that had gone to the bad.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了向这些包装中注入第二种更强的泡菜，这种泡菜可以消除气味--工人们将这一过程称为"给他们百分之三十"。另外，火腿熏完后，会发现有些火腿已经变质了

vocabulary.definition: n. 装置, 器具, 器官；[化] 仪器; 器械
vocabulary.context: In the pickling of hams they had an ingenious apparatus, by which they saved time and increased the capacity of the plant-a machine consisting of a hollow needle attached to a 1.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在腌制火腿时，他们有一个巧妙的设备，通过它节省了时间并增加了设备的容量--一台由连接到 1 的空心针组成的机器

vocabulary.context: They profess to show him how, if he is a grocer, he may become a sporting yachtsman; how, if he is a tenth-rate journalist, he may become a peer; and how, if he is a German Jew, he may become an Anglo-Saxon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们声称向他展示，如果他是一名杂货商，他如何可以成为一名运动游艇运动员；如果他是一个十流的记者，他怎样才能成为一个同行？如果他是德国犹太人，他如何可能成为盎格鲁撒克逊人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 公然地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，对于向新勤奋学徒传讲的福音，我们该怎么说呢？学徒的崛起不是因为他的美德，而是因为他的恶习？

vocabulary.definition: n. 祭司的本领, 神职人员对世俗权力的使用

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 删除, 修订, 使纯洁

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人类古老的寓言确实充满智慧。但我们决不能为了先生的利益而将它们删除

vocabulary.context: ...elections for Parliament, county councils, district boards, parish-councils, and municipalities, but for coroners, school inspectors, churchwardens, curators of museums, sanitary authorities, police-court interpreters, swimming-bath instructors, contractors, choir-masters, market superintendents, art-school teachers, cathedral vergers, and other...

vocabulary.definition: adj. 笑剧的, 滑稽的, 笑剧性的
vocabulary.context: The hitherto unbroken success of the brilliant farcical comedy "Henry's Rabbit" was imperilled by the presence of drearily weeping women in stalls and circle and gallery, and one of the brightest divorce cases that had been tried for many years was robbed of much of its sparkle by the lachrymose behaviour of a section of the audience.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 精彩的滑稽喜剧《亨利的兔子》迄今从未间断的成功，却因摊位、圈子和画廊中出现的哀哭的妇女而受到威胁，而多年来审理过的最引人注目的离婚案件之一，也因部分观众的流泪行为而失去了大部分光彩

vocabulary.definition: adj. 厌恶的, 讨厌的, 令人厌烦的
vocabulary.context: In the country districts, the task of carrying out the provisions of the new Act was irksome enough; in the towns and cities it became an incubus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在乡村地区，执行新法案条款的任务已经够令人厌烦的了；在城镇里，它变成了梦魇

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爱哭的, 悲哀的
vocabulary.context: The hitherto unbroken success of the brilliant farcical comedy "Henry's Rabbit" was imperilled by the presence of drearily weeping women in stalls and circle and gallery, and one of the brightest divorce cases that had been tried for many years was robbed of much of its sparkle by the lachrymose behaviour of a section of the audience.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 精彩的滑稽喜剧《亨利的兔子》迄今从未间断的成功，却因摊位、圈子和画廊中出现的哀哭的妇女而受到威胁，而多年来审理过的最引人注目的离婚案件之一，也因部分观众的流泪行为而失去了大部分光彩

vocabulary.definition: n. 香橼, 香橼果皮, 香橼色；[医] 枸橼; 枸橼状的
vocabulary.context: The No-Votes-for-Women League numbered its feminine adherents by the million; its colours, citron and old Dutch-madder, were flaunted everywhere, and its battle hymn, "We Don't Want to Vote," became a popular refrain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不给女性投票权联盟的女性追随者有数以百万计；它的颜色--柠檬色和古老的荷兰茜草色--随处可见，它的战歌"我们不想投票"也成为流行的歌曲

vocabulary.definition: n. 周末
vocabulary.context: Society women found their arrangements impeded and upset by the continual necessity for attending the polling stations, and week-end parties and summer holidays became gradually a masculine luxury.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 社会妇女发现她们的安排因不断前往投票站而受到阻碍和不安，周末聚会和暑假逐渐成为男性的奢侈

vocabulary.definition: n. 十分, 完全；彻底
vocabulary.context: He was one of the unexpected things that happen in politics, and he happened with great thoroughness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是政治中发生的意想不到的事情之一，而且发生得非常彻底

vocabulary.definition: n. 保姆
vocabulary.context: "What are we to do?" asked the Prime Minister, whose cook had wept into all the breakfast dishes and whose nursemaid had gone out, crying quietly and miserably, to take the children for a walk in the Park.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们该怎么办？"首相要求带孩子们去公园散步，因为他的厨师已经哭到了所有的早餐盘子里，而他的保姆也出去了，静静地、痛苦地哭泣着

vocabulary.definition: n. 得意洋洋, 兴高采烈；[医] 得意[洋洋], 高兴
vocabulary.context: From the very outset the Compulsory Female Franchise produced little or no elation even in circles which had been loudest in demanding the vote.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从一开始，强制女性选举权就没有引起多少或根本没有兴奋，即使是在要求投票最响亮的圈子里也是如此

vocabulary.definition: num. 第三十, 三十分之一
vocabulary.context: The Mortal Sickness had swept away the entire Royal Family, unto the third and fourth generations, and thus it came to pass that Hermann the Fourteenth of Saxe-Drachsen-Wachtelstein, who had stood thirtieth in the order of succession, found himself one day ruler of the British dominions within and beyond the seas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种致命的疾病席卷了整个王室，直到第三代和第四代，因此，在继承顺序中排名第三十的萨克森-德拉克森-瓦赫特尔施泰因的第十四代赫尔曼发现自己有一天成为了英国海洋内外领土的统治者

vocabulary.definition: n. 确实, 确证, 确证的事实；[法] 加强证据, 独立证据, 确证
vocabulary.context: The man whom you can reduce to a state of fear by threats of retribution, is not reduced to such a state by your words, but by the corroboration of a guilty conscience within him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可以用报复的威胁使一个人陷入恐惧的状态，但他并不是因为你的言语而陷入这种恐惧的状态，而是因为他内心有罪的良心得到了证实

vocabulary.definition: adj. 企图暴发致富的
vocabulary.context: And the whole posse of get-rich-quick thieves, and the whole class of those who fatten on the productive thought and labor of others, are the ones who fear the specter of Change as it were an accusing spirit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 整个一夜暴富的小偷队伍，以及靠他人的生产性思想和劳动致富的整个阶层，都是害怕变革幽灵的人，因为它是一种指责的精神

vocabulary.definition: adv. 包含地；在内地

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 废黜, 废位赶出

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 换新鞋面, 修理, 修补, 修改；[经] 整修, 补, 修改
vocabulary.context: The teaching that any class is good enough to rule another class is the old theory of the divine right of kings revamped and applied to a privileged aristocracy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 任何阶级都足以统治另一个阶级的教义是国王神圣权利的旧理论，经过改造并应用于特权贵族

vocabulary.definition: n. 咆哮者, 号哭的人；[电] 啸鸣电路

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你停下来思考时，所有这一切都非常奇怪，因为就在几个月前，任何对未来做出不乐观预测的人都被谴责为"灾难咆哮者"

vocabulary.definition: n. 美观而无价值的东西, 玩具, 小玩意

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们现在比以往任何时候都更加高贵，狭窄的胸前悬挂着高贵的小玩意

vocabulary.definition: n. 懒惰者, 游手好闲的人, 惰轮；[化] 惰轮

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们富有的闲人被迫为面包而工作，并在装饰性存在之外为公众利益做出一些贡献，这会是一个灾难性的变化吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 淤塞, 停滞；[医] 停滞, 滞留, 郁积
vocabulary.context: The peace of stagnation is an attribute of death.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 停滞的平静是死亡的一个属性

vocabulary.definition: n. 恶习, 恶行, 罪恶, 堕落, 缺陷, 恶癖, 老虎钳；v.t. 钳住；prep. 代替
vocabulary.context: Even the idle nobleman who loses his luxury is not going to be hurt--he will be a better man without his idleness, his useless luxury and his expensive vices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 即使是失去了奢侈的游手好闲的贵族也不会受到伤害--如果没有了游手好闲、无用的奢侈和昂贵的恶习，他将成为一个更好的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 盖碗, 焙盘

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特蕾莎的餐桌上，三套不同的餐具（一个家庭到底需要多少瓷器？）中，摆着一个最精致的盖碗

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们是两个兄弟的新新娘，一个是水手，一个是地主，由于加拿大战争和汹涌的大西洋的影响，连续两天传来了他们各自死亡的消息

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她躺着，听着雨滴，雨滴单调地连续落下，没有被风吹动；一种紧张的冲动不断地促使她从枕头上抬起头，凝视着玛丽的房间和中间的公寓

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的脑子里充满了令人愉快的想法，直到睡眠偷偷溜走，把它们变成了幻象，更令人愉快、更狂野，就像冬天的气息一样，（但这是一个多么冷酷的比较！）在窗户上画出奇妙的窗饰

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她打开夜里关着的房门，虽然没有锁上，走到床边，正要把手放在熟睡者的肩膀上

vocabulary.definition: v. 适合于
vocabulary.context: The rainy twilight of an autumn day; a parlor on the second floor of a small house, plainly furnished, as beseemed the middling circumstances of its inhabitants, yet decorated with little curiosities from beyond the sea, and a few delicate specimens of Indian manufacture, - these are the only particulars to be premised in regard to scene and season.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 秋雨的黄昏；一间小房子二楼的客厅，陈设朴素，适合其居民的中等环境，但装饰有来自海外的一些好奇心，以及一些印度制造的精致标本--这些是关于场景和季节的唯一细节

vocabulary.definition: n. 求婚者, 求爱者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不尴尬的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...俄罗斯将确保世界其他国家进行最好和最自由的合作，为她获得不受阻碍和无障碍的机会，独立决定自己的政治发展和国家政策，并向她保证在她自己的机构下受到真诚欢迎进入自由国家社会...

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无妨碍的, 无阻碍的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...影响俄罗斯的问题将确保世界其他国家进行最好和最自由的合作，为她获得不受阻碍和无障碍的机会，独立决定自己的政治发展和国家政策，并确保她受到真诚欢迎进入自由国家社会......

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无可争辩, 无可置疑
vocabulary.context: An independent Polish state should be erected which should include the territories inhabited by indisputably Polish populations, which should be assured a free and secure access to the sea, and whose political and economic independence and territorial integrity should be guaranteed by international covenant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 应建立一个独立的波兰国家，其中应包括无可争议的波兰人民居住的领土，应确保其自由和安全地出海，其政治和经济独立及领土完整应受到国际公约的保障

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...但是现在在土耳其统治下的其他民族应该得到毫无疑问的生命安全和绝对不受干扰的自主发展机会，达达尼尔海峡应该在国际保障下永久开放，作为所有国家船舶和商业的自由通道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无疑的, 确实的；[法] 无疑的, 确实的
vocabulary.context: ...Empire should be assured a secure sovereignty, but the other nationalities which are now under Turkish rule should be assured an undoubted security of life and an absolutely unmolested opportunity of autonomous development, and the Dardanelles should be permanently opened as a free passage to the ships and commerce of all nations under...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...帝国应该得到安全的主权保证，但现在在土耳其统治下的其他民族应该得到毫无疑问的生命安全和绝对不受干扰的自主发展机会，达达尼尔海峡应该永久开放，作为所有国家船舶和商业的自由通道......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 非寻求来的, 没有预料到的, 意外的
vocabulary.context: The day of conquest and aggrandizement is gone by; so is also the day of secret covenants entered into in the interest of particular governments and likely at some unlooked-for moment to upset the peace of the world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 征服和扩张的日子已经过去了；这也是为了特定政府的利益而签订秘密盟约的日子，这些盟约很可能在某个意想不到的时刻扰乱世界的和平

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人羡慕的, 可羡慕的
vocabulary.context: We grudge her no achievement or distinction of learning or of pacific enterprise such as have made her record very bright and very enviable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们对她在学习或和平事业方面没有取得任何成就或荣誉感到不满，这些成就或荣誉使她的记录非常辉煌和令人羡慕

vocabulary.definition: n. 再现, 再发生, 反复, 循环；[医] 复发, 再发

vocabulary.definition: n. 晴朗, 明白
vocabulary.context: I propos'd to myself, for the sake of clearness, to use rather more names, with fewer ideas annex'd to each, than a few names with more ideas; and I included under thirteen names of virtues all that at that time occurr'd to me as necessary or desirable, and annexed to each a short precept, which fully express'd the extent I gave to its meaning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了清楚起见，我向自己建议，使用更多的名字，每个名字所附加的想法要少，而不是使用几个带有更多想法的名字；我把当时想到的所有必要的或可取的美德归入十三个美德名称下，并为每一个美德附上一条简短的戒律，充分表达了我对其含义的理解

vocabulary.definition: n. 正直, 纯正, 正确；[法] 公正, 正直, 严正
vocabulary.context: I concluded, at length, that the mere speculative conviction that it was our interest to be completely virtuous, was not sufficient to prevent our slipping; and that the contrary habits must be broken, and good ones acquired and established, before we can have any dependence on a steady, uniform rectitude of conduct.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我最后得出的结论是，纯粹的推测性信念，即我们的利益是完全有道德的，并不足以防止我们滑倒；在我们能够依赖稳定、一致的正直行为之前，必须打破相反的习惯，养成并建立良好的习惯
