vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我会把脸颊轻轻地靠在枕头舒适的脸颊上，就像婴儿时期的脸颊一样丰满、绽放

vocabulary.definition: adv. 有效地；全然；实质上
vocabulary.context: ...and had come under the thrall of one of my childish terrors, such as that old terror of my great-uncle's pulling my curls, which was effectually dispelled on the day - the dawn of a new era to me - on which they were finally cropped from my head.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...并且受到了我幼稚恐惧的束缚，例如我的叔公拉扯我的卷发的古老恐惧，在我新时代的黎明的那一天，这种恐惧被有效地驱散了，在那一天，它们最终从我的头上剪掉了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 即时的, 瞬间的, 猝发的；[机] 瞬时的
vocabulary.context: ...hear the regular creaking of the wainscot, or to open my eyes to settle the shifting kaleidoscope of the darkness, to savour, in an instantaneous flash of perception, the sleep which lay heavy upon the furniture, the room, the whole surroundings of which I formed but an insignificant part whose unconsciousness I should very soon return to share.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...听到壁板有规律的吱吱声，或者睁开眼睛来解决黑暗中变幻莫测的万花筒，在感知的瞬间闪现中，品味沉睡在家具、房间和整个周围环境中的睡眠，而我在其中形成的只是一个微不足道的部分，我很快就会回归到分享其无意识

vocabulary.definition: n. 奴隶, 束缚, 奴役
vocabulary.context: ...I was asleep I had returned without the least effort to an earlier stage in my life, now for ever outgrown; and had come under the thrall of one of my childish terrors, such as that old terror of my great-uncle's pulling my curls, which was effectually dispelled on the day - the dawn of a new era to me - on which they were finally cropped...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...我睡着了，我毫不费力地回到了我生命的早期阶段，现在已经永远不再适合我了；我被一种幼稚的恐惧所困扰，比如我的叔祖父拉扯我的卷发，这种恐惧在那天--对我来说是一个新时代的黎明--最终被剪掉了，被有效地驱散了......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不熟悉的
vocabulary.context: ...due to being in a strange place, to doing unusual things, to the last words of conversation, to farewells exchanged beneath an unfamiliar lamp which echoed still in his ears amid the silence of the night; and to the delightful prospect of being once again at home.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...由于在一个陌生的地方，由于做了不寻常的事情，由于谈话的最后一句话，由于在陌生的灯下交换了告别，这在寂静的夜晚仍然在他的耳边回响；以及再次回到家的美好前景

vocabulary.definition: n. 寄物间

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你知道我没有什么像样的衣服穿。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 瘦肉, 倾斜, 倾斜度；adj. 瘦的, 贫乏的, 歉收的；v.i. 倚靠, 倾斜, 依赖；v.t. 使倾斜

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我看到他--他和他的妻子靠在他的手臂上，走过来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 庄重的, 壮观的, 显赫的, 重大的, 最高的, 雄伟的, 宏大的, 豪华的, 傲慢的；[法] 重大的, 主要的, 伟大的
vocabulary.context: ...could not down me; that his leaving me the way he left me, that his breaking my heart the way he broke it, didn't crush me; that his grand life and my pinched-in life, his having learning and my not having learning - that the difference didn't count so much like it seemed; that on the bottom I was the same like him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ......不能让我失望；他以离开我的方式离开我，以他伤我的方式伤我的心，但并没有压垮我；他的宏伟生活和我的拮据生活，他有学问和我没有学问--区别并不像看起来那么重要；从本质上讲，我和他是一样的

vocabulary.definition: n. 匆促, 冲进, 急流, 灯心草；v.i. 冲, 奔, 闯, 赶紧, 匆促行事, 涌现；v.t. 使冲, 匆忙地做, 突袭, 飞跃, 用灯心草做；adj. 紧急的
vocabulary.context: everything in me rushed to him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的一切都冲向了他

vocabulary.definition: adv. 表示敬意地, 谦恭地
vocabulary.context: With a little trouble we made out to examine the papers without Bartleby, though at every page or two, Turkey deferentially dropped his opinion that this proceeding was quite out of the common; while Nippers, twitching in his chair with a dyspeptic nervousness, ground out between his set teeth occasional hissing maledictions...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 费了点小麻烦，我们在没有巴图比的情况下检查了这些文件，尽管在每一页或两页上，土耳其都恭敬地放弃了他的观点，认为这种做法是非常不寻常的；而尼普斯则因消化不良的紧张而在椅子上抽搐，咬紧牙关时不时地发出嘶嘶的咒骂......

vocabulary.definition: adv. 耻辱地, 屈辱地, 丢脸地
vocabulary.context: With any other man I should have flown outright into a dreadful passion, scorned all further words, and thrust him ignominiously from my presence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于任何其他人，我都会立即陷入一种可怕的激情，蔑视所有进一步的言语，并将他可耻地从我面前推开

vocabulary.definition: adv. 受益地；获利地；有使用权地
vocabulary.context: After a few words touching his qualifications, I engaged him, glad to have among my corps of copyists a man of so singularly sedate an aspect, which I thought might operate beneficially upon the flighty temper of Turkey, and the fiery one of Nippers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在谈论了他的资质之后，我聘用了他，我很高兴在我的抄写员队伍中拥有一个如此冷静的人，我认为这可能对火鸡的轻浮脾气和尼珀人的火爆脾气有所帮助

vocabulary.definition: adj. 四倍的, 四重的, 一式四份的, 四次方的；n. 一式四份中的一份, 一式四份；v.t. 把...作成一式四份；[计] 四倍的, 四重的
vocabulary.context: A few days after this, Bartleby concluded four lengthy documents, being quadruplicates of a week's testimony taken before me in my High Court of Chancery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几天后，巴图比完成了四份冗长的文件，是我在高等衡平法院接受的一周证词的四份

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未铺地毯的
vocabulary.context: I heard a slow scrape of his chair legs on the uncarpeted floor, and soon he appeared standing at the entrance of his hermitage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我听到他的椅子腿在没有铺地毯的地板上发出缓慢的刮擦声，很快他就站在他隐居的入口处

vocabulary.definition: adv. 治不好地, 不能矫正地
vocabulary.context: I can see that figure now - pallidly neat, pitiably respectable, incurably forlorn!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我现在能看到那个身影--苍白整洁，可怜可敬，无可救药的孤独！

vocabulary.definition: n. 抄写员, 模仿者
vocabulary.context: Every copyist is bound to help examine his copy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个抄写员都有义务帮助检查他的副本

vocabulary.definition: adj. 精神饱满的, 有生气的, 勇敢的
vocabulary.context: For example, I cannot credit that the mettlesome poet Byron would have contentedly sat down with Bartleby to examine a law document of, say five hundred pages, closely written in a crimpy hand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，我无法相信勇敢的诗人拜伦会心满意足地与巴图比坐下来审查一份用皱巴巴的手写得密密麻麻的法律文件，比如说五百页

vocabulary.definition: n. 直立, 竖起, 建筑物；[化] 装配
vocabulary.context: I placed his desk close up to a small side-window in that part of the room, a window which originally had afforded a lateral view of certain grimy back-yards and bricks, but which, owing to subsequent erections, commanded at present no view at all, though it gave some light.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我把他的桌子放在靠近房间那部分的一扇小侧窗的地方，这扇窗户最初可以从侧面看到某些肮脏的后院和砖块，但由于后来的安装，目前根本看不到任何景色，尽管它提供了一些光线

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无光泽地, 苍白无血色地
vocabulary.context: I can see that figure now - pallidly neat, pitiably respectable, incurably forlorn!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我现在能看到那个身影--苍白整洁，可怜可敬，无可救药的孤独！

vocabulary.definition: n. 粗糙, 劣等, 粗
vocabulary.context: ...hand; and many a time afterwards, in the course of his life, shuddered at seeing how much inhumanity there is in man, how much savage coarseness is concealed beneath delicate, refined worldliness, and even in that man whom the world acknowledges as honourable and noble.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...手；此后，在他的一生中，很多时候，他不寒而栗地看到，人身上有多少不人道的一面，在精致、高雅的世俗之下隐藏着多少野蛮的粗俗，甚至在那个被世人公认为光荣和高贵的人身上也是如此

vocabulary.definition: n. 俗心, 俗气

vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...他的一生，颤抖着看到人身上有多少不人道，在精致、精致的世俗之下隐藏着多少野蛮的粗俗，甚至在那个被世界公认为光荣和高贵的人身上也是如此

vocabulary.definition: adj. 快乐的；华美的
vocabulary.context: Long afterwards, in his gayest moments, there recurred to his mind the little official with the bald forehead, with his heart-rending words, "Leave me alone!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很久以后，在他最快乐的时刻，他的脑海里浮现出那个额头秃顶的小官员，那句令人心碎的话："别打扰我！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有教养的, 高贵的, 良种的
vocabulary.context: Some sub-chief would thrust a paper under his nose without so much as saying, "Copy," or "Here's a nice interesting affair," or anything else agreeable, "The Overcoat by Nikolai Gogol" by Scanned as is customary amongst well-bred officials.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些副首长会把一张纸塞到他鼻子底下，连一句"抄袭"、"这是一件有趣的事情"或其他任何令人愉快的话都没有说，扫描的"尼古拉·果戈里的大衣"是有教养的官员的惯例

vocabulary.definition: n. 女房东, 女地主
vocabulary.context: The young officials laughed at and made fun of him, so far as their official wit permitted; told in his presence various stories concocted about him, and about his landlady, an old woman of seventy; declared that she beat him; asked when the wedding was to be; and strewed bits of paper over his head, calling them snow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 年轻的官员们在官方智慧允许的范围内嘲笑他。当着他的面讲述了各种关于他和他的女房东（一位七十岁的老妇人）的故事。宣称她殴打了他；询问婚礼何时举行；并将一些纸片撒在他的头上，称之为雪

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 复发, 回到, 重现, 再来, 诉诸, 采用, 循环
vocabulary.context: Long afterwards, in his gayest moments, there recurred to his mind the little official with the bald forehead, with his heart-rending words, "Leave me alone!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很久以后，在他最快乐的时刻，他的脑海里浮现出那个额头秃顶的小官员，那句令人心碎的话："别打扰我！

vocabulary.definition: n. 地方议会成员, 议会委员, 顾问, 评议员, 参赞；[法] 议员, 评议员, 顾问
vocabulary.context: If his pay had been in proportion to his zeal, he would, perhaps, to his great surprise, have been made even a councillor of state.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他的报酬与他的热情成正比，那么令他大吃一惊的是，也许他甚至会被任命为国务委员

vocabulary.definition: n. 来的人, 新来者, 有成功希望的人
vocabulary.context: There was in it something which moved to pity; so much that one young man, a new comer, who, taking pattern by the others, had permitted himself to make sport of Akakiy, suddenly stopped short, as though all about him had undergone a transformation, and presented itself in a different aspect.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其中有某种令人怜悯的东西；以至于一个年轻人，一个新来的人，效仿其他人，允许自己取笑阿卡基，突然停了下来，仿佛他周围的一切都发生了转变，并以不同的面貌呈现出来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 暴虐的, 暴君的, 残暴的
vocabulary.context: tyrannical unbearable, as when they jogged his hand and prevented his attending to his work, he would exclaim, "Leave me alone!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 暴虐难以忍受，当他们慢跑他的手并阻止他专注于工作时，他会惊呼："别打扰我！

vocabulary.definition: n. 喜欢的事物；adj. 喜爱的, 宠爱的
vocabulary.context: Enjoyment was written on his face: some letters were even favourites with him; and when he encountered these, he smiled, winked, and worked with his lips, till it seemed as though each letter might be read in his face, as his pen traced it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的脸上写满了喜悦：有些信件甚至是他最喜欢的；当他遇到这些时，他微笑，眨眼，用嘴唇工作，直到当他的笔描画时，每个字母似乎都可以从他的脸上读出

vocabulary.definition: adj. (=freakish)畸形的, 捉摸不定的

vocabulary.definition: n. 同名人, 同名物

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 问：在你的第一本书《疾病的解释者》和你的新书《同名者》中，你写到了印度移民和融入美国文化的困难

vocabulary.definition: adj. 矛盾的, 模棱两可的；[医] 矛盾情绪的
vocabulary.context: I've always been very ambivalent about things Indian.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我对印度事物一直很矛盾

vocabulary.definition: adj. 冷嘲的, 挖苦的, 反话的, 讽刺的, 令人啼笑皆非的, 出乎意料的
vocabulary.context: So when I see someone like Madonna sporting the Indian look, it's very ironic to me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，当我看到像麦当娜这样的人穿着印度服装时，这对我来说非常讽刺

vocabulary.definition: n. 初次登台, 开张；v. 初次登台
vocabulary.context: You made a spectacular debut with "Interpreter of Maladies," winning the Pulitzer Prize.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 您凭借《疾病的诠释者》首次亮相，获得了普利策奖

vocabulary.definition: n. 折扣, 贴现率；v.t. 打折扣；v.i. 贴现
vocabulary.context: But it was like being a kid and getting a senior citizens' discount.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这就像小时候享受老年人折扣一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 进口货, 进口, 输入, 含义, 重要性；v.t. 输入, 引入, 进口, 含...的意思, 重要；v.i. 有关系；[计] 引入
vocabulary.context: So do you ignore all these Indian imports?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那么你会忽略所有这些印度进口产品吗？

vocabulary.definition: adv. 事实上
vocabulary.context: You've said that despite living virtually all your life in the States, you still find it hard to think of yourself as an American.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你曾说过，尽管你几乎一生都生活在美国，但你仍然发现很难将自己视为美国人

vocabulary.definition: n. 小说, 长篇故事；adj. 新奇的, 异常的
vocabulary.context: How much pressure did you feel writing this novel?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 写这本小说你感受到了多大的压力？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无边界的
vocabulary.context: Yet this destructive, eight-year-long nightmare was soon followed by an era of strong economic growth that provided Europe with gleaming new industries and infrastructure, increased its standard of living, and set the continent on a path to a goal that used to be considered impossible: a borderless unification.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，这场长达八年的毁灭性噩梦之后很快就进入了经济强劲增长的时代，为欧洲提供了闪闪发光的新工业和基础设施，提高了其生活水平，并使欧洲大陆走上了一条通往过去被认为不可能的目标的道路：无国界统一

vocabulary.definition: n. 耳上记号, 特征, 记号, 标记；v.t. 在耳朵上做记号, 标记, 指定...作特定用途
vocabulary.context: Most of the money was earmarked for the biggest industrial nations because of their importance for the region's recovery, but another important benchmark was each nation's contribution to the defeat of Hitler's Germany.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大部分资金专门用于最大的工业国家，因为它们对该地区的复苏很重要，但另一个重要的基准是每个国家对击败希特勒德国的贡献

vocabulary.definition: adj. 厌战的, 破损不堪的
vocabulary.context: The war-weary and disorganized Europeans couldn't meet Marshall's request by designing their own blueprint for recovery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 厌倦战争、组织混乱的欧洲人无法通过设计自己的复兴蓝图来满足马歇尔的要求

vocabulary.definition: n. 缺乏, 穷困
vocabulary.context: The war's survivors, including millions of civilians, prisoners of war, inmates of German concentration camps, slave laborers, and refugees from Eastern Europe faced unprecedented privation and misery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 战争幸存者，包括数百万平民、战俘、德国集中营的囚犯、奴隶劳工和来自东欧的难民，面临着前所未有的贫困和苦难

vocabulary.definition: adj. 跨国的, 跨越边界的; 国境线交叉的
vocabulary.context: ...Interest, and Foreign Policy of the United States," the Marshall plan required participating nations-including the U.S.-to ease cross-border trade; do away with red tape and many regulations; increase productivity and labor union membership; and adopt modern business procedures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...美国的利益和外交政策"，马歇尔计划要求参与国（包括美国）放松跨境贸易；废除繁文缛节和许多法规；提高生产力和工会成员资格；并采用现代商业程序

vocabulary.definition: n. 统一, 联合, 一致；[医] 连结; 统一
vocabulary.context: Yet this destructive, eight-year-long nightmare was soon followed by an era of strong economic growth that provided Europe with gleaming new industries and infrastructure, increased its standard of living, and set the continent on a path to a goal that used to be considered impossible: a borderless unification.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，这场长达八年的毁灭性噩梦之后很快就进入了经济强劲增长的时代，为欧洲提供了闪闪发光的新工业和基础设施，提高了其生活水平，并使欧洲大陆走上了一条通往过去被认为不可能的目标的道路：无国界统一

vocabulary.definition: n. 朴素, 苦行, 严格, 严峻
vocabulary.context: By reducing the post-war austerity measures, the influence of communist parties, and popular discontent, the Marshall plan strengthened political stability that encouraged ever-closer European integration and alliance with the U.S.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过减少战后紧缩措施、共产党的影响和民众的不满情绪，马歇尔计划加强了政治稳定，鼓励了欧洲更加紧密的一体化以及与美国的联盟

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 妨碍, 阻碍, 阻止
vocabulary.context: efforts to prevent the spread of communist dictatorships and Soviet influence, but it did not impede economic and political progress in Western Europe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 努力阻止共产主义独裁和苏联影响力的蔓延，但这并没有阻碍西欧的经济和政治进步

vocabulary.definition: n. 动脉粥样硬化；[医] [动脉]粥样硬化
vocabulary.context: In January 1953, the official Soviet daily Pravda (meaning "truth") startled the world by announcing the arrest of 15 top medical doctors - almost all Jews - who were treating Stalin's atherosclerosis and other ailments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1953年1月，苏联官方日报《真理报》（Pravda，意为"真相"）宣布逮捕了15名治疗斯大林动脉粥样硬化和其他疾病的顶级医生（几乎都是犹太人），震惊了世界

vocabulary.definition: adv. 难以置信地; 令人震惊地; 摇晃地; 蹒跚地
vocabulary.context: The second wave of murders followed the staggeringly successful June 1941 invasion of the Soviet Union - in brazen violation of the 1939 treaty - by the Wehrmacht.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二波谋杀是在 1941 年 6 月德国国防军公然违反 1939 年条约并取得惊人成功的入侵苏联之后发生的

vocabulary.definition: n. 代表, 委员, 人民委员(前苏联部长的旧称)
vocabulary.context: Khrushchev, who served in the war as a political commissar, charged in his memoirs that Stalin's conduct of the war "cost us much blood."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 曾在战争中担任政委的赫鲁晓夫在回忆录中指责斯大林的战争行为"让我们付出了太多的鲜血"

vocabulary.definition: adj. （尤指以令人不悦、具冒犯性或愚蠢可笑的方式）高谈阔论的, 夸夸其谈的, 胡吹乱侃的
vocabulary.context: A forceful personality and a loud-mouthed bully, he avoided any situation or activity that that was physically dangerous.

vocabulary.context: He was a native of Georgia, one of the 15 republics that later made up the Soviet Union; he spoke Russian with a thick accent; he was notorious for his vulgarity, crude anti-Semitism and rudeness; and his physique was marred by a short build, a pockmarked face, and a crippled left arm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是格鲁吉亚人，格鲁吉亚是后来组成苏联的 15 个共和国之一；他说俄语，口音很重。他因粗俗、粗鲁的反犹太主义和粗鲁而臭名昭著。他身材矮小，脸上有麻子，左臂也残废了

vocabulary.definition: n. <俄>俄国郊外的别墅
vocabulary.context: He had ruled over the 140 million people of the Union of the Soviet Socialist Republics (USSR) for almost 30 years, and he passed away at night, alone, in his dacha - country house - without a last word to be recorded for posterity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他统治了苏维埃社会主义共和国联盟（苏联）的 1.4 亿人民近 30 年，他在夜间独自在他的乡间别墅中去世，没有为后人留下任何遗言

vocabulary.definition: n. 寻觅失事船只者, 拆卸旧建筑物者, 破坏分子, 打捞者, 打捞船, 救险车
vocabulary.context: "Soviet and economic activists who were branded in 1937-1938 as 'enemies' were actually never enemies, spies, wreckers," Khrushchev told the delegates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "1937-1938年间被贴上'敌人'标签的苏联和经济活动家实际上从来都不是敌人、间谍、破坏者，"赫鲁晓夫告诉代表们

vocabulary.definition: n. 自以为是；伪善

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最终，这种自以为是排除了南北再次妥协的可能性

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1854年共和党的成立被谴责为"南方无法接受的暴行和侮辱"，南方政客和报纸经常诋毁北方人，称其为远低于高贵南方白人的非人类生物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 优秀的, 超群的, 卓越的

vocabulary.definition: n. 对立, 敌对, 敌意；[化] 拮抗作用; 消效作用
vocabulary.context: To this growing antagonism in the North, the Southerners' responded with an increasingly virulent, hateful attacks on their critics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于北方日益增长的敌意，南方人对他们的批评者进行了越来越恶毒、充满仇恨的攻击

vocabulary.definition: n. 顺从, 温顺
vocabulary.context: But to grow these staples required large fields and plenty of workers who were cheap and, in the description of one South Carolina planter, of "inferior" race "but eminently qualified in temper, in vigor, in docility, (and) in capacity to stand the climate."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但种植这些主食需要大片土地和大量工人，这些工人价格低廉，用南卡罗来纳州一位种植园主的描述来说，他们是"低等"种族，"但在脾气、活力、顺从和（和）承受气候的能力方面都非常合格"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 取下...的绞链, 拉开, 搅乱, 使分开
vocabulary.context: The subsequent secession of eleven Southern states, their formation of the ill-fated Confederate States of America, and the April 1861 bombardment of the Union's Fort Sumter that started the Civil War, were the products of the South's unhinged and irrational mindset caused by the slavery.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后南方十一个州的分裂、命运多舛的美利坚联盟国的形成，以及 1861 年 4 月对联邦萨姆特堡的轰炸引发的内战，都是奴隶制造成的南方精神错乱和非理性心态的产物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 近似人类的, 类人的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1854年共和党的成立被谴责为"南方无法接受的暴行和侮辱"，南方政客和报纸经常诋毁北方人，称其为远低于高贵南方白人的非人类生物

vocabulary.definition: n. 案例；[法] 案例, 原因, 事故
vocabulary.context: Deriding the Northerners as animals, the Southerners denounced the 1860 election of the "Black Infidel" Abraham Lincoln for president as "a deliberate, cold-blooded insult and outrage" and turned it into a casus belli.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 南方人嘲笑北方人是动物，谴责1860年"黑人异教徒"亚伯拉罕·林肯当选总统是"蓄意的、冷血的侮辱和暴行"，并将其变成了宣战理由

vocabulary.definition: adv. 沉重地; 烦闷地; 压迫地
vocabulary.context: In the lower half of our continent, early settlers learned that there was a way to make a good living despite the region's oppressively hot, humid and unhealthy climate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我们大陆的下半部，早期的定居者了解到，尽管该地区气候炎热、潮湿且不健康，但仍有一种方法可以过上好日子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高尚的, 高洁的, 傲慢的
vocabulary.context: As the South's high-minded self-esteem increasingly clashed with the slavery's moral rejection by the rest of the world (by the 1850s, only the South and Brazil owned large numbers of slaves), the region's leaders defended their economic system and their grossly exaggerated sense of honor with arguments that most Northerners found beyond baffling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着南方高尚的自尊与世界其他地区对奴隶制的道德排斥日益发生冲突（到1850年代，只有南方和巴西拥有大量奴隶），该地区的领导人用大多数北方人难以理解的论点来捍卫自己的经济体系和过分夸大的荣誉感

vocabulary.definition: adv. congressional的变形
vocabulary.context: After all, for more than 100 years, we Americans have trusted government experts to strengthen the safety of our food, drinks, medicines and a myriad of other products and processes by fairly enforcing congressionally approved laws and regulations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毕竟，一百多年来，我们美国人一直信任政府专家通过公平执行国会批准的法律和法规来加强我们的食品、饮料、药品以及无数其他产品和流程的安全

vocabulary.definition: n. 执法（机构或官员）
vocabulary.context: Constitution that deals with the "right of the people to be secure in their persons, houses, papers, and effects, against unreasonable searches and seizures" and seeks to protect this right by "requir[ing] law-enforcement officers to obtain warrants before making most searches."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宪法涉及"人民有权保护其人身、房屋、文件和财物免受不合理搜查和扣押"，并试图通过"要求执法人员在进行大多数搜查之前获得搜查令"来保护这一权利

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无领袖的, 无领导的
vocabulary.context: declaration of war on Japan, and to Occupy Wall Street, a self-described "leaderless resistance movement" that four days after the 2016 elections called for "A people's assembly to elect and swear in an alternative American 'government in exile'" - Americans have never been reluctant to question their government's actions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对日本宣战，以及占领华尔街，这是一场自称"无领导的抵抗运动"，在 2016 年选举四天后呼吁"召开人民大会选举并宣誓建立一个替代性的美国'流亡政府'"--美国人从来都不愿意质疑他们政府的行为

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，新法律--虽然在复杂性和混乱方面并不完全是鲁布·戈德堡式的--设定了一个繁琐、更耗时和昂贵的程序，以提供与前一法案相对简单的第 215 条大致相同的结果

vocabulary.definition: n. 人口统计学家
vocabulary.context: In his book The Next America , Paul Taylor, a demographer at the Pew Research Center, writes that "[a]s a people, we're growing older, more unequal, more diverse, more mixed race, more digitally linked, more tolerant, less married, less fertile, less religious, less mobile, and less confident."

vocabulary.definition: adj. 晕船的
vocabulary.context: Tired, sea-sick, and hungry after a crossing that could take up to six weeks, they would disembark from their crowded, smelly compartments only to be herded into a crowded, smelly great room that could hold (and sleep on the floor) up to 1,000 people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在长达六周的穿越之后，他们疲惫、晕船、饥饿，从拥挤、恶臭的车厢下船，却被赶进一个拥挤、恶臭的大房间，这个房间最多可容纳 1,000 人（并睡在地板上）

vocabulary.definition: n. 膨胀主义, 领土扩张政策；[法] 扩张主义, 膨胀主义者
vocabulary.context: The exclusionary emphasis highlighted also the 1952 McCarran-Walter Act, a Cold War measure that reflected the fears generated by the aggressive expansionism of the Soviet Union.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 排他性的强调还强调了 1952 年的《麦卡伦-沃尔特法案》，这是一项冷战措施，反映了苏联侵略扩张主义所产生的恐惧

vocabulary.definition: adj. <正>排斥（性）的, 排除在外的
vocabulary.context: The exclusionary emphasis highlighted also the 1952 McCarran-Walter Act, a Cold War measure that reflected the fears generated by the aggressive expansionism of the Soviet Union.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 排他性的强调还强调了 1952 年的《麦卡伦-沃尔特法案》，这是一项冷战措施，反映了苏联侵略扩张主义所产生的恐惧

vocabulary.definition: n. 低能, 愚钝, 愚蠢言行；[医] 痴愚, 愚钝
vocabulary.context: They paid special attention to indications of mental illness or intellectual disability, not only "imbecility" but also depression, epilepsy and cerebral palsy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们特别关注精神疾病或智力障碍的迹象，不仅是"低能"，还包括抑郁症、癫痫症和脑瘫

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自负的, 自命不凡的, 夸耀的
vocabulary.context: For the millions who responded to Emma Lazarus' ringing call of "Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free," the pretentious edifice was the gateway to futures and opportunities vastly better than what they left behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于数以百万计响应艾玛·拉扎勒斯的响亮号召的人来说，"给我你们疲惫的、你们的穷人、你们挤在一起渴望自由呼吸的群众"，这座自命不凡的大厦是通往未来和机会的门户，比他们留下的要好得多

vocabulary.definition: n. 大厦, 大建筑物
vocabulary.context: For the millions who responded to Emma Lazarus' ringing call of "Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free," the pretentious edifice was the gateway to futures and opportunities vastly better than what they left behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于数以百万计响应艾玛·拉扎勒斯的响亮号召的人来说，"给我你们疲惫的、你们的穷人、你们挤在一起渴望自由呼吸的群众"，这座自命不凡的大厦是通往未来和机会的门户，比他们留下的要好得多

vocabulary.definition: adj. 镇压的, 抑制的
vocabulary.context: By the time of his death at age 44 in 1988, SVREP had fostered hundreds of Latino political candidates, organized countless nonpartisan voter drives to engage poor, disenfranchised Latinos and successfully litigated more than 75 lawsuits to help reverse gerrymandering, eliminate language barriers and other suppressive voter practices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到 1988 年 44 岁去世时，SVREP 已经培养了数百名拉丁裔政治候选人，组织了无数无党派选民活动来吸引贫穷、被剥夺公民权的拉丁裔，并成功提起超过 75 起诉讼，以帮助扭转选区划分不公、消除语言障碍和其他压制性选民做法

vocabulary.definition: adj. 超党派的, 不支持任何党派的, 不受任何党派影响的, 不受任何党派控制的
vocabulary.context: By the time of his death at age 44 in 1988, SVREP had fostered hundreds of Latino political candidates, organized countless nonpartisan voter drives to engage poor, disenfranchised Latinos and successfully litigated more than 75 lawsuits to help reverse gerrymandering, eliminate language barriers and other suppressive voter practices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到 1988 年 44 岁去世时，SVREP 已经培养了数百名拉丁裔政治候选人，组织了无数无党派选民活动来吸引贫穷、被剥夺公民权的拉丁裔，并成功提起超过 75 起诉讼，以帮助扭转选区划分不公、消除语言障碍和其他压制性选民做法

vocabulary.definition: n. 连本带利的赌；v.t. 连本带利的赌, 使增值, 成功地利用
vocabulary.context: His grassroots work registering and mobilizing Latino voters, starting in his home state of Texas, parlayed the frustrations, hopes and pride of a diverse, fast-growing segment of the U.S.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他从家乡德克萨斯州开始，开展了登记和动员拉丁裔选民的基层工作，充分利用了美国多元化、快速增长的群体的挫败感、希望和自豪感

vocabulary.definition: adj. 挨家挨户的, 送货上门的；adv. 挨户地, 送货上门地
vocabulary.context: The group conducted door-to-door voter registration drives and Spanish-language voter campaigns in areas with low registration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该组织在登记率低的地区开展了挨家挨户的选民登记活动和西班牙语选民活动

vocabulary.definition: n. 选民, 有选举权者, 选区；[法] 选民, 选举团, 选区
vocabulary.context: Few people have had as profound an impact on the political empowerment of America's Latino electorate as Willie Velásquez.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很少有人能像威利·委拉斯开兹那样对美国拉丁裔选民的政治赋权产生如此深远的影响

vocabulary.definition: n. 模特儿职业, 立体感；[计] 建模, 模型化, 模拟
vocabulary.context: An Activist Youth, Modeling Black Voting Rights Leaders
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位激进青年，为黑人投票权领袖树立榜样

vocabulary.definition: n. 党羽, 虔诚信徒, 同党, 游击队员；adj. 党派的, 偏袒的, 效忠的, 献身的, 盲目推崇的
vocabulary.context: And together with the Mexican American Legal Defense and Educational Fund, they successfully pursued lawsuits to undo unfair partisan redistricting and other discriminatory practices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们与墨西哥裔美国人法律辩护和教育基金会一起成功提起诉讼，以消除不公平的党派重新划分和其他歧视性做法

vocabulary.definition: adj. 工人阶级的
vocabulary.context: Velásquez, "Willie" to his friends and others who knew him, grew up in a working-class family in San Antonio, Texas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 委拉斯开兹，被他的朋友和其他认识他的人称为"威利"，在德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥的一个工人阶级家庭长大

vocabulary.definition: adv. 荒凉地, 寂寞地
vocabulary.context: I watched it through a pair of glasses, seeking to verify my early conception of an iceberg - in the geographies of my grammar- school days the pictures of icebergs always included a stranded polar bear, standing desolately upon one of the snowy crags.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我透过一副眼镜观看它，试图验证我早期对冰山的概念--在我上小学时的地理知识中，冰山的照片总是包括一只被困的北极熊，孤零零地站在一处白雪皑皑的峭壁上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 轻松的, 无忧无虑的
vocabulary.context: Indeed, I grew so light-hearted that when I caught my first sight of the train which was to take us to Paris, I enjoyed a hearty laugh.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，我变得如此轻松，以至于当我第一次看到开往巴黎的火车时，我开心地笑了

vocabulary.definition: v. 迎合, 牵就, 顺应( humor的现在分词 )
vocabulary.context: My benefactor, humoring my curiosity and enthusiasm, which seemed to please him very much, suggested that we take a short walk before dinner.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的恩人满足了我的好奇心和热情，这似乎让他很高兴，建议我们在晚饭前散散步

vocabulary.definition: n. 安心, 放心, 再保证
vocabulary.context: I did not feel at ease until the ship was well out of New York harbor; and, notwithstanding the repeated reassurances of my millionaire friend and my own knowledge of the facts in the case, I somehow could not rid myself of the sentiment that I was, in a great degree, responsible for the widow's tragic end.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到船驶离纽约港，我才感到轻松。尽管我的百万富翁朋友一再保证，而且我自己也了解案件的事实，但我还是无法摆脱这样的感觉：我在很大程度上对寡妇的悲惨结局负有责任

vocabulary.definition: n. 峭壁, 危岩；[建] 岩石碎块
vocabulary.context: I watched it through a pair of glasses, seeking to verify my early conception of an iceberg - in the geographies of my grammar- school days the pictures of icebergs always included a stranded polar bear, standing desolately upon one of the snowy crags.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我透过一副眼镜观看它，试图验证我早期对冰山的概念--在我上小学时的地理知识中，冰山的照片总是包括一只被困的北极熊，孤零零地站在一处白雪皑皑的峭壁上

vocabulary.definition: n. 简陋小屋, 杂物间, 家畜小屋
vocabulary.context: It impressed me as the perfect and perfectly beautiful city; and even after I had been there for some time, and seen not 9 10 only its avenues and palaces, but its most squalid alleys and hovels, this impression was not weakened.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它给我的印象是完美、美丽的城市；即使我在那里呆了一段时间，不仅看到了9·10的大街和宫殿，还看到了最肮脏的小巷和茅屋，这种印象也没有减弱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 污秽的, 肮脏的, 悲惨的, 可怜的, 卑劣的
vocabulary.context: It impressed me as the perfect and perfectly beautiful city; and even after I had been there for some time, and seen not 9 10 only its avenues and palaces, but its most squalid alleys and hovels, this impression was not weakened.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它给我的印象是完美、美丽的城市；即使我在那里呆了一段时间，不仅看到了9·10的大街和宫殿，还看到了最肮脏的小巷和茅屋，这种印象也没有减弱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 致病的, 病态的, 疾病的, 可怕的；[医] 病的
vocabulary.context: This morbid state of mind, together with seasickness, kept me miserable for three or four days.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种病态的心态，再加上晕船，让我痛苦了三四天

vocabulary.definition: n. 不变, 不变性；[经] 不变性
vocabulary.context: In the immutability of their surroundings the foreign shores, the foreign faces, the changing immensity of life, glide past, veiled not by a sense of mystery but by a slightly disdainful ignorance; for there is nothing mysterious to a seaman unless it be the sea itself, which is the mistress of his existence and as 1.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在他们周围一成不变的环境中，异国的海岸、异国的面孔、变化无常的生活，悄然掠过，不是被神秘感所掩盖，而是被一种略显轻蔑的无知所掩盖；因为对于海员来说，没有什么神秘的，除非大海本身，大海是他存在的情妇，也是1

vocabulary.definition: n. 航路
vocabulary.context: Lights of ships moved in the fairway - a great stir of lights going up and going down.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 船舶的灯光在航道上移动--灯光忽上忽下，产生了巨大的混乱

vocabulary.definition: n. 六角形手风琴
vocabulary.context: Imagine him here - the very end of the world, a sea the color of lead, a sky the color of smoke, a kind of ship about as rigid as a concertina - and going up this river with stores, or orders, or what you like.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 想象他在这里--世界的尽头，铅色的大海，烟色的天空，一艘像手风琴一样僵硬的船--带着商店、订单或你喜欢的东西沿着这条河逆流而上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不变的
vocabulary.context: Immutable(adjective)unchanging over time or unable to be changed inscrutable as Destiny.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不可变（形容词）随着时间的推移不变或无法像命运一样难以捉摸地改变

vocabulary.definition: n. 月光, 大话, 非法酿制的酒
vocabulary.context: But Marlow was not typical (if his propensity to spin yarns be excepted), and to him the meaning of an episode was not inside like a kernel but outside, enveloping the tale which brought it out only as a glow brings out a haze, in the likeness of one of these misty halos that sometimes are made visible by the spectral illumination of moonshine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但马洛并不典型（如果他编故事的倾向除外），对他来说，一段情节的意义不是像内核一样在里面，而是在外面，包裹着故事，只有当光芒带出薄雾时，它才被带出来，就像这些雾蒙蒙的光环之一，有时在月光的光谱照射下变得可见

vocabulary.definition: adj. 久坐的, 坐惯的, 定栖的；[医] 静坐的; 坐式的
vocabulary.context: He was a seaman, but he was a wanderer, too, while most seamen lead, if one may so express it, a sedentary life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是一名海员，但他也是一名流浪者，而大多数海员（如果可以这样表达的话）过着久坐的生活

vocabulary.definition: adj. 军团的, 军队的；n. 军团士兵
vocabulary.context: - trireme in the Mediterranean, ordered suddenly to the north; run overland across the Gauls in a hurry; put in charge of one of these craft the legionaries, - a wonderful lot of handy men they must have been too - used to build, apparently by the hundred, in a month or two, if we may believe what we read.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: - 地中海的三层桨战舰，突然向北航行；匆忙从陆路穿过高卢人；如果我们相信我们所读到的内容，那么让军团士兵负责其中的一艘--他们肯定也是很多勤劳的人--用来建造，显然在一两个月内建造了一百艘

vocabulary.definition: n. 船员, 海员, 水兵；[法] 海员, 水手, 精通海事者
vocabulary.context: He was a seaman, but he was a wanderer, too, while most seamen lead, if one may so express it, a sedentary life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是一名海员，但他也是一名流浪者，而大多数海员（如果可以这样表达的话）过着久坐的生活

vocabulary.definition: n. 纱, 纱线, 故事；[化] 纱
vocabulary.context: The yarns of seamen have a direct simplicity, the whole meaning of which lies within the shell of a cracked nut.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海员的纱线具有直接的简单性，其全部意义就在于破裂的坚果壳中

vocabulary.definition: n. 晕轮, 光圈, 晕状物, 荣光；v.t. 使有晕轮, 围以光环；v.i. 成晕轮
vocabulary.context: But Marlow was not typical (if his propensity to spin yarns be excepted), and to him the meaning of an episode was not inside like a kernel but outside, enveloping the tale which brought it out only as a glow brings out a haze, in the likeness of one of these misty halos that sometimes are made visible by the spectral illumination of moonshine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但马洛并不典型（如果他编故事的倾向除外），对他来说，一段情节的意义不是像内核一样在里面，而是在外面，包裹着故事，只有当光芒带出薄雾时，它才被带出来，就像这些雾蒙蒙的光环之一，有时在月光的光谱照射下变得可见

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 戏耍, 玩弄, 闲混；v.t. 浪费
vocabulary.context: I dallied so much with the thought of selling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我花了很多时间考虑出售

vocabulary.definition: adv. 同此, 用此方法
vocabulary.context: In wishing you herewith a Merry Christmas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在此祝您圣诞快乐

vocabulary.definition: adv. 就每个而论, 各
vocabulary.context: "A thousand Christmas trees!-at what apiece?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "一千棵圣诞树！-每棵是多少？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 缓和, 适度, 温和；[化] 慢化
vocabulary.context: With a buyer's moderation, "That would do."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果买家适度的话，"那就行了。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 树叶, 植物
vocabulary.context: And whirls of foliage not yet laid, there drove
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尚未落下的树叶旋风，已驱赶而来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有利润的, 有利益的, 赚钱的；[经] 有利(可图)的, 合算的
vocabulary.context: Beyond the time of profitable growth,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 超越盈利增长时期，

vocabulary.definition: n. 牧场, 草地, 牧草；v.t. 放牧；v.i. 吃草
vocabulary.context: Pasture they spring in, some in clumps too close
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们涌入的牧场，有些成群结队，距离太近

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 诱惑, 引诱, 引起...的兴趣, 吸引, 冒...风险
vocabulary.context: I doubt if I was tempted for a moment
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我有一瞬间怀疑自己是否动心了

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 听到, 倾听, 听说, 审理；v.i. 听见, 听
vocabulary.context: From hope of hearing good of what was mine, I said,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 出于希望听到我的好话，我说：

vocabulary.definition: n. 带领啦啦队
vocabulary.context: The post was not directed to anyone in particular and the receiving audience was limited to a finite group of "friends." While normally a Snapchat expires after 24 hours (which would have been before school resumed classes on Monday), another student took it upon herself to screenshot Levy's Snap before it expired and showed it to the cheerleading coach.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该帖子并未针对特定任何人，接收受众仅限于有限的"朋友"群体。通常 Snapchat 会在 24 小时后过期（即周一学校恢复上课之前），但另一名学生主动在过期前截取了 Levy 的 Snap 截图，并将其展示给啦啦队教练

vocabulary.definition: n. 违反, 违背, 矛盾；[法] 违反, 触犯, 抵触
vocabulary.context: They cannot unlearn the detrimental lesson of the powerful control over the messaging of the non-powerful, even if it is in contravention of the oft-touted marketplace of ideas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们无法忘记强权控制非强权者的信息传递的有害教训，即使这与经常吹捧的思想市场相悖

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不许可地, 不允许地
vocabulary.context: The Court ruled in favor of Levy and found the school district impermissibly punished her for off-campus speech that did not significantly interfere with or disrupt school activities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 法院做出了对利维有利的裁决，并认为学区因她在校外发表未严重干扰或扰乱学校活动的言论而对她进行了不允许的惩罚

vocabulary.definition: adv. 意味深长地
vocabulary.context: If they can't rely on schools as a safe, educational place to practice civic engagement, we can't expect them to evolve into adults who meaningfully participate in society.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果他们不能依靠学校作为一个安全的教育场所来实践公民参与，我们就不能指望他们成长为有意义地参与社会的成年人

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不能挽回地, 不能恢复地
vocabulary.context: It is typically impossible as well as impractical for a student to obtain judicial review and meaningful redress prior to being harmed, often irreparably, by a public school's disciplinary decision.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学生在受到公立学校纪律决定的伤害（通常是不可挽回的伤害）之前获得司法审查和有意义的补救通常是不可能且不切实际的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 没有得到通知的, 未被告知的, 无知的, 不学无术的, 未受教育的, 蒙昧的；[法] 未被告知的, 未得通知的, 无知的
vocabulary.context: ...both may arguably be considered accurate, there is a tremendous difference in how each statement is likely to be received by the uninformed reader.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...两者都可以被认为是准确的，但不知情的读者如何接受每个陈述可能存在巨大差异

vocabulary.definition: v. 删剪（书籍、电影等中被认为犯忌、违反道德或政治上危险的内容）( censor的现在分词 )
vocabulary.context: However, the First Amendment prohibits public school officials from censoring student expression made outside the school environment even if it employs objectionable or inappropriate language regarded as incompatible with the school's official stance based on its own perception of community values.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，第一修正案禁止公立学校官员审查学生在学校环境之外的言论，即使该言论使用了令人反感或不恰当的语言，这些语言被认为与学校基于其对社区价值观的看法的官方立场不相容

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有公德心的, 热心公益的
vocabulary.context: If our nearly 250-year-old legal system is still redefining that phrase, how do we expect civic-minded rookies to find that line before they cross it?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们已有近 250 年历史的法律体系仍在重新定义这句话，那么我们如何期望有公民意识的新手在跨越这条线之前找到这条线呢？

vocabulary.definition: n. 分裂者, 破坏者
vocabulary.context: The moment Levy was disciplined for her Snapchat in 2017, she became stigmatized as a disruptor with a formal record of the same.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2017 年，当利维因 Snapchat 受到纪律处分时，她就被污蔑为有过类似记录的破坏者

vocabulary.definition: adj. 厚颜的, 无耻的, 色情的
vocabulary.context: In Levy , the school administration sought to extend the boundaries of the "schoolhouse gate" by punishing a disgruntled cheerleader for using the words "F_ school F_ softball F_ cheer F_ everything" (along with a cheeky picture of Levy raising the one-finger salute) in a Snapchat post over the weekend while she was off school grounds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在 Levy 案中，学校管理部门试图扩大"校舍大门"的界限，惩罚了一名心怀不满的啦啦队长，因为她周末不在校园时在 Snapchat 帖子中使用了"F_学校 F_垒球 F_欢呼 F_一切"（以及一张 Levy 举起单指敬礼的厚脸皮照片）

vocabulary.definition: n. 叶黄素；[医] 黄体素, 脂色素
vocabulary.context: Lutein is one of the hydroxy carotenoids that make up the macular pigment of human retinas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 叶黄素是构成人类视网膜黄斑色素的羟基类胡萝卜素之一

vocabulary.definition: adj. 生物及生物药效应(bioavailable)的
vocabulary.context: By reading the participants' blood serum levels, the researchers found that lutein from the carrots was 65 percent as bioavailable as it was from the supplement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过读取参与者的血清水平，研究人员发现胡萝卜中的叶黄素的生物利用度是补充剂中的 65%

vocabulary.definition: adv. 强烈地；集中地
vocabulary.context: "But the carrot-breeding process has gone on intensively for just 50 years."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "但胡萝卜育种过程仅持续了 50 年。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 有选择地
vocabulary.context: They've selectively bred a rainbow of carrots - purple, red, yellow, even white.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们选择性地培育出了彩虹般的胡萝卜--紫色、红色、黄色，甚至白色

vocabulary.definition: n. 花青素（anthocyanin的复数）
vocabulary.context: Purple carrots possess an entirely different class of pigments - anthocyanins - which act as powerful antioxidants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 紫胡萝卜含有一种完全不同的色素--花青素--它是强大的抗氧化剂

vocabulary.definition: n. 胡萝卜素；[化] 胡萝卜素; 叶红素
vocabulary.context: Over two decades ago, scientists in the ARS Vegetable Crops Research Unit at Madison, Wisconsin, began a quest to breed carrots packed with beta-carotene - an orange pigment used by the body to create vitamin A.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 二十多年前，威斯康星州麦迪逊市 ARS 蔬菜作物研究中心的科学家们开始探索培育富含 β-胡萝卜素的胡萝卜，β-胡萝卜素是一种人体用来产生维生素 A 的橙色色素

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有斑点的, 有污点的；[医] 斑[点]的
vocabulary.context: Lutein is one of the hydroxy carotenoids that make up the macular pigment of human retinas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 叶黄素是构成人类视网膜黄斑色素的羟基类胡萝卜素之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 举起, 拿起, 理解, 上风井, 摄入, 吸收；[化] 摄取
vocabulary.context: In a study to determine humans' lutein uptake from lutein-rich yellow carrots, Simon, along with UW's Sherry Tanumihardjo, recruited nine 23-to 28-year-old volunteers to eat the carrots and take a lutein supplement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一项确定人类从富含叶黄素的黄胡萝卜中摄取叶黄素的研究中，西蒙和华盛顿大学的雪莉·塔努米哈乔（Sherry Tanumihardjo）招募了 9 名 23 至 28 岁的志愿者来吃胡萝卜并服用叶黄素补充剂

vocabulary.definition: n. 浆液, 血清, 乳清；[医] 血清; 浆液
vocabulary.context: By reading the participants' blood serum levels, the researchers found that lutein from the carrots was 65 percent as bioavailable as it was from the supplement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过读取参与者的血清水平，研究人员发现胡萝卜中的叶黄素的生物利用度是补充剂中的 65%

vocabulary.definition: n. 雪利酒, 葡萄酒
vocabulary.context: In a study to determine humans' lutein uptake from lutein-rich yellow carrots, Simon, along with UW's Sherry Tanumihardjo, recruited nine 23-to 28-year-old volunteers to eat the carrots and take a lutein supplement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一项确定人类从富含叶黄素的黄胡萝卜中摄取叶黄素的研究中，西蒙和华盛顿大学的雪莉·塔努米哈乔（Sherry Tanumihardjo）招募了 9 名 23 至 28 岁的志愿者来吃胡萝卜并服用叶黄素补充剂

vocabulary.definition: adj. 热爱自由的
vocabulary.context: The future of Turkey, as an independent and economically sound state, is clearly no less important to the freedom-loving peoples of the world than the future of Greece.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为一个独立且经济健全的国家，土耳其的未来对于世界上热爱自由的人民来说显然不亚于希腊的未来

vocabulary.definition: n. 渗入, 渗透, 渗透物；[化] 渗滤; 渗入过滤; 渗透; 渗入
vocabulary.context: But we cannot allow changes in the status quo in violation of the Charter of the United Nations by such methods as coercion, or by such subterfuges as political infiltration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我们不能允许通过强制等手段、政治渗透等手段来违反《联合国宪章》来改变现状

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有结核的, 结节的, 结核的；[医] 结节的, 结节状的
vocabulary.context: Eighty-five percent of the children were tubercular.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 百分之八十五的儿童患有结核病

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 巩固, 确证；[法] 确证, 确定, 证实
vocabulary.context: Preliminary reports from the American Economic Mission now in Greece and reports from the American Ambassador in Greece corroborate the statement of the Greek Government that assistance is imperative if Greece is to survive as a free nation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 目前驻希腊的美国经济代表团的初步报告和美国驻希腊大使的报告证实了希腊政府的说法，即如果希腊要作为一个自由国家生存下去，援助势在必行

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有自尊心的, 自重的
vocabulary.context: Greece must have assistance if it is to become a self-supporting and self-respecting democracy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 希腊如果要成为一个自给自足、自尊的民主国家，就必须得到援助

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 赦, 宽恕；[法] 宽恕, 不咎, 抵销
vocabulary.context: The extension of aid by this country does not mean that the United States condones everything that the Greek Government has done or will do.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该国延长援助并不意味着美国纵容希腊政府已经做过或将要做的一切

vocabulary.definition: n. 征服, 镇压, 平息；[法] 征服, 镇压, 克制
vocabulary.context: I believe that it must be the policy of the United States to support free peoples who are resisting attempted subjugation by armed minorities or by outside pressures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我认为，美国的政策必须支持那些抵抗少数武装或外部压力企图征服的自由人民

vocabulary.definition: n. 抑压, 镇压, 抑制；[计] 抑制
vocabulary.context: It relies upon terror and oppression, a controlled press and radio, fixed elections, and the suppression of personal freedoms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它依赖于恐怖和压迫、受控的新闻和广播、固定的选举以及对个人自由的压制

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不动感情地, 冷静地; 平心静气
vocabulary.context: So long, however, as we revere the whisperings of the herd, we are obviously unable to examine them dispassionately and to consider to what extent they are suited to the novel conditions and social exigencies in which we find ourselves to-day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，只要我们尊重群体的低语，我们显然就无法冷静地审视它们，并考虑它们在多大程度上适合我们今天所处的新条件和社会迫切需要

vocabulary.definition: n. 误会, 误解；[医] 误会, 领会错误
vocabulary.context: Rationalizing is the self-exculpation which occurs when we feel ourselves, or our group, accused of misapprehension or error.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 合理化是当我们感到自己或我们的团体被指责误解或错误时发生的自我开脱

vocabulary.definition: n. 易受影响, 易受暗示性
vocabulary.context: "If we feared the entertaining of an unverifiable opinion with the warmth with which we fear using the wrong implement at the dinner table, if the thought of holding a prejudice disgusted us as does a foul disease, then the dangers of man's suggestibility would be turned into advantages."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "如果我们害怕接受未经证实的观点，就像我们害怕在餐桌上使用错误的工具一样，如果持有偏见的想法像恶心一样让我们感到厌恶，那么人类的暗示的危险就会变成优势。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 轻视, 说...坏话, 毁谤, 贬低, 轻蔑；[法] 诽谤, 不相称
vocabulary.context: These facts are not recalled here as a gratuitous disparagement of the truly great, but to insure a full realization of the tremendous competition which all really exacting thought has to face, even in the minds of the most highly endowed mortals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些事实在这里并不是作为对真正伟人的无端贬低，而是为了确保充分认识到所有真正严格的思想都必须面对的巨大竞争，即使是在最有天赋的凡人的头脑中也是如此

vocabulary.definition: n. 事先钩成的看法, 成见；[法] 先入之见, 成见, 偏见
vocabulary.context: This spontaneous and loyal support of our preconceptions - this process of finding "good" reasons to justify our routine beliefs - known to modern psychologists as "rationalizing" - clearly only a new name for a very ancient thing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种对我们先入之见的自发而忠诚的支持--这种寻找"好的"理由来证明我们的常规信念合理的过程--被现代心理学家称为"合理化"--显然只是一个非常古老的事物的新名称

vocabulary.definition: n. 自我辩白
vocabulary.context: It doubtless influences all our speculations in its persistent tendency to self-magnification and self-justification, which are its chief preoccupations, but it is the last thing to make directly or indirectly for honest increase of knowledge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 毫无疑问，它以自我夸大和自我辩护的持久倾向影响着我们所有的思辨，这是它的主要关注点，但它是直接或间接地为诚实地增加知识而做的最后一件事

vocabulary.definition: v. 误解
vocabulary.context: The origin and progress and future promotion of civilization are ill understood and misconceived.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 文明的起源、进步和未来的推动是不被理解和误解的

vocabulary.definition: n. 珍贵；过分讲究
vocabulary.context: On entering a room there are those who will perceive at a glance the degree of preciousness of the rugs, the character of the pictures, and the personality revealed by the books.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 进入一个房间，人们一眼就能看出地毯的珍贵程度、图画的特色以及书籍所揭示的个性

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不加批评地, 不加鉴别地
vocabulary.context: Indeed, it seems to me inevitable that just as the various sciences of nature were, before the opening of the seventeenth century, largely masses of rationalizations to suit the religious sentiments of the period, so the social sciences have continued even to our own day to be rationalizations of uncritically accepted beliefs and customs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，在我看来，正如十七世纪开始之前的各种自然科学在很大程度上是为了适应那个时期的宗教情感而进行的大量合理化一样，社会科学甚至到了我们今天仍然继续对不加批判地接受的信仰和习俗进行合理化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能证实的, 无法核实的, 无可考证的, 无法检验的
vocabulary.context: "If we feared the entertaining of an unverifiable opinion with the warmth with which we fear using the wrong implement at the dinner table, if the thought of holding a prejudice disgusted us as does a foul disease, then the dangers of man's suggestibility would be turned into advantages."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "如果我们害怕接受未经证实的观点，就像我们害怕在餐桌上使用错误的工具一样，如果持有偏见的想法像恶心一样让我们感到厌恶，那么人类的暗示的危险就会变成优势。"

vocabulary.definition: v. 私卖(酒)
vocabulary.context: She jumped up from the table, went into their library, and came back with a copy of Orwell's bootlegged Animal Farm .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她从桌子上跳起来，走进他们的图书馆，然后带着一本盗版的奥威尔的《动物农场》回来

vocabulary.definition: n. 自我审查，自我检查
vocabulary.context: "Stalin is sacrosanct," Orwell wrote of the prevailing ignorance in "Freedom of the Press," his essay chastising media self-censorship that had been "universally observed since 1941" and even "ten years earlier than that," he wrote.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥威尔在《新闻自由》中谈到普遍存在的无知时写道，"斯大林是神圣不可侵犯的"，他在文章中谴责了"自 1941 年以来普遍遵守的"甚至"比这早十年"的媒体自我审查制度

vocabulary.definition: adv. 唐吉诃德式地
vocabulary.context: These were the windmills he quixotically fought against: reading through the lines of mainstream dogma and rubbing the fog off the rosy glasses of his generation overly enamored with Stalin's strength, which they confused with the hopes and dreams of the Russian Revolution.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些是他堂吉诃德式地反对的风车：通读主流教条的线条，擦去他那一代过于迷恋斯大林力量的玫瑰色眼镜上的雾气，他们将斯大林的力量与俄罗斯革命的希望和梦想混淆了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 坚定地；忠实地
vocabulary.context: Ševčenko described the Ukrainian DPs to Orwell in a letter, "Their situation and past, causes them to sympathise with Trotskyites, although there are several differences between them." The major difference being a staunchly anti-communist stance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 塞夫琴科在给奥威尔的一封信中描述了乌克兰的民主党人，"他们的处境和过去使他们同情托洛茨基分子，尽管他们之间存在一些差异。"主要区别在于坚定的反共立场

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 同情, 表示同情, 同感, 一致, 共鸣, 同意, 赞同, 赞成, 吊唁, 吊慰
vocabulary.context: Ševčenko described the Ukrainian DPs to Orwell in a letter, "Their situation and past, causes them to sympathise with Trotskyites, although there are several differences between them." The major difference being a staunchly anti-communist stance.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 塞夫琴科在给奥威尔的一封信中描述了乌克兰的民主党人，"他们的处境和过去使他们同情托洛茨基分子，尽管他们之间存在一些差异。"主要区别在于坚定的反共立场

vocabulary.definition: n. 意外的幸运机会, 意外地来得正好的事物, 天赐
vocabulary.context: Orwell agreed to write a preface, refused any royalties, and even tried to recruit his friend Arthur Koestler, author of the Soviet dystopian novel Darkness at Noon , writing, "I have been saying ever since 1945 that the DPs were a godsend opportunity for breaking down the wall between Russia and the West."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥威尔同意写序言，拒绝支付任何版税，甚至试图招募他的朋友、苏联反乌托邦小说《正午的黑暗》的作者阿瑟·科斯特勒，他写道："自1945年以来我一直在说，DPs是打破俄罗斯与西方之间的墙的天赐良机。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 团, 班, 一伙；v.i. 巡回演出
vocabulary.context: ...was just one of many that were bootlegged and distributed in a cultural revival that included traveling theater and ballet troupes, Shakespearian performances in Ukrainian, opera and piano instruction for children, public art galleries with classes and lectures, crafty masquerade balls and dances, pan-DP camp artistic conferences,...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...只是在文化复兴中被盗版和传播的众多作品之一，其中包括巡回戏剧和芭蕾舞团、乌克兰语莎士比亚表演、儿童歌剧和钢琴教学、设有课程和讲座的公共艺术画廊、狡猾的化装舞会和舞蹈、泛DP营地艺术会议......

vocabulary.definition: n. 集体化
vocabulary.context: The title read in Ukrainian Kolhosp Tvaryn -The Collective Farm - an obvious reference to Stalin's forced collectivization enforced by the terror famine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 标题读于乌克兰语 Kolhosp Tvaryn - 集体农场 - 明显指的是斯大林因恐怖饥荒而强制实行的集体化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 介绍的, 引导的, 开端的
vocabulary.context: By the time my uncle immigrated to New York at the age of fourteen, he had already learned calculus, Greek and Latin philosophy, introductory physics and chemistry, botany, and zoology.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我叔叔十四岁时移民到纽约时，他已经学习了微积分、希腊和拉丁哲学、入门物理和化学、植物学和动物学

vocabulary.definition: n. 前景, 最显著的位置；[计] 前景, 前台
vocabulary.context: The cover was an earthy red, green, and brown illustration of an exhausted, run-down Boxer the horse pulling a cart in the background, and in the foreground rested a menacing pig, whip in hand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 封面是土红色、绿色和棕色的插图，背景是一匹精疲力尽、疲惫不堪的拳击手，马拉着一辆大车，前景是一头手持鞭子、气势汹汹的猪

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在外交上, 靠外交途径, 凭外交手腕
vocabulary.context: chooses to misinterpret diplomatically.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 选择以外交方式曲解

vocabulary.definition: n. 漫不经心, 粗心大意, 疏漏, 错误；[法] 粗心大意, 疏漏, 漫不经心
vocabulary.context: It is not an inadvertence - a slip of the pencil - when I call her the Donna Quixote of the Nineteenth Century.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我称她为十九世纪的唐娜·吉诃德时，这并非疏忽--笔误

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不能溶解地, 不可分解地
vocabulary.context: Anthony is indissolubly linked with a love of my youth - my dear Knight of La Mancha.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安东尼与我年轻时的挚爱--我亲爱的拉曼恰骑士有着不可分割的联系

vocabulary.definition: adj. 被生染的, 彻底的, 道地的
vocabulary.context: It is the homespun, dyed-in-the-wool brand, as distinguished from the boudoir, beauty-doctored brand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它是土布、纯羊毛的品牌，区别于闺房、美容医生的品牌

vocabulary.definition: n. 逃避, 推诿；模棱两可
vocabulary.context: But I get back to my question - in spite of Susan B.'s evasiveness - and I ask it a little straighter from the shoulder:
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我回到我的问题--尽管苏珊 B. 闪烁其辞--我问得更直接一些：

vocabulary.definition: n. 女性气质
vocabulary.context: Anthony kind of womanliness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安东尼的女人味

vocabulary.definition: n. 感受性, 接受能力
vocabulary.context: In my mind's eye - and, let me hasten to assure you, I am not a woman's suffragist; I am without prejudices; I am still in a state of receptivity - the windmills my Donna Quixote has tilted against are not the figments of HER fancy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我看来--而且，让我赶紧向你保证，我不是妇女参政论者；我没有偏见；我仍然处于接受状态--我的唐娜·吉诃德倾斜的风车并不是她想象中的虚构

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 删除；修正
vocabulary.context: Anthony is over, permanently over; that she has come into her own; that even the "funny man" of our newspaper world finds the point of his paragraph dulled by his respect for her, that he has voluntarily blue-penciled her off the list of his stick subjects.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 安东尼结束了，永远结束了；她已经成为了自己的人；即使是我们报纸界的"有趣的人"也发现他的段落的要点由于他对她的尊重而变得迟钝，他自愿将她从他的固定主题列表中删除

vocabulary.definition: adv. 回忆地, 怀旧地
vocabulary.context: She is still vivid, strong and mistress of her mind, not dwelling reminiscently in the past, but pointing with commanding hand to what must be done in the present and the future.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她依然生动、坚强，是她心灵的主宰，她不再沉迷于过去，而是用指挥之手指出现在和未来必须要做的事情

vocabulary.definition: n. 晚霞, 夕照；[医] 滞光, 余辉
vocabulary.context: Now she is but the lingering of the sunset slope, in the pleasant afterglow of labor faithfully done and life well spent - yet still active, still a force, it must be remembered.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，她只是夕阳坡上的一抹余辉，在忠实地完成劳动和度过美好人生的宜人余辉中--但仍然活跃，仍然是一股力量，必须被记住

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大言不惭的, 夸张的, 夸大的
vocabulary.context: ...to pay, and I did long to stand behind a wheel again and never roam any more - but I had been making such an ass of myself lately in grandiloquent letters home about my blind lead and my European excursion that I did what many and many a poor disappointed miner had done before; said "It is all over with me now, and I will never go back home to be...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ......付钱，我确实很想再次站在方向盘后面，不再漫游--但最近我一直在夸张地写信回家，谈论我的盲目领先和我的欧洲旅行，我做了很多很多可怜的失望矿工以前做过的事情；说："现在我的一切都结束了，我永远不会回家......

vocabulary.definition: n. 亡命之徒；[法] 亡命之徒, 暴徒
vocabulary.context: Presently, when things began to look dismal again, a desperado killed a man in a saloon and joy returned once more.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不久，当事情再次变得令人沮丧时，一个亡命之徒在一家酒吧里杀死了一个人，欢乐再次降临

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无比的, 无上的；n. 完美无比的人, 举世无双的人/物, 完美无比的物
vocabulary.context: Two nonpareil columns had to be filled, and I was getting along.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 必须填写两个无与伦比的栏目，而我相处得很好

vocabulary.definition: n. 不适当, 不胜任
vocabulary.context: But my transports cooled when I thought of my inexperience and consequent unfitness for the position - and straightway, on top of this, my long array of failures rose up before me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，当我想到自己缺乏经验并因此不适合这个职位时，我的兴奋感就冷却了--除此之外，我一长串的失败立刻浮现在我的面前

vocabulary.definition: n. 某某人, 某某事
vocabulary.context: "Never say 'We learn' so-and-so, or 'It is reported,' or 'It is rumored,' or 'We understand' so-and-so, but go to headquarters and get the absolute facts, and then speak out and say 'It is so-and-so.' Otherwise, people will not put confidence in your news.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "永远不要说'我们了解到'某某、'据报道'、'据传'、'我们了解'某某，而是去总部了解绝对事实，然后说出来，说'是某某'。"否则，人们不会相信你的新闻

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未穿外套的
vocabulary.context: I was a rusty looking city editor, I am free to confess - coatless, slouch hat, blue woolen shirt, pantaloons stuffed into boot-tops, whiskered half down to the waist, and the universal navy revolver slung to my belt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我是一个看上去生锈的城市编辑，我可以自由地承认--光着外套，戴着宽边软帽，穿着蓝色羊毛衬衫，把裤子塞进靴子里，胡须留到腰部，腰带上挂着一把通用的海军左轮手枪

vocabulary.definition: n. 事件, 意外发生的事
vocabulary.context: Still, there is information in the volume; information concerning an interesting episode in the history of the Far West, about which no books have been written by persons who were on the ground in person, and saw the happenings of the time with their own eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不过，卷中有信息；关于远西历史上一个有趣事件的信息，没有任何书籍是由那些亲自在当地亲眼目睹当时发生的事情的人写的

vocabulary.definition: n. 移民, 侨民；adj. 移民的, 移居的
vocabulary.context: Next I discovered some emigrant wagons going into camp on the plaza and found that they had lately come through the hostile Indian country and had fared rather roughly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 接下来，我发现一些移民马车驶入广场上的营地，发现他们最近经过敌对的印度国家，行驶得相当艰难

vocabulary.definition: n. 审讯, 讯问, 验尸；[医] 验尸
vocabulary.context: "Dan used to make a good thing out of the hay wagons in a dry time when there were no fires or inquests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "丹曾经在没有火灾或审讯的干旱时期用干草车制作出好东西

vocabulary.definition: adj. 碎屑的, 破烂的
vocabulary.context: We climbed far up on the mountain side and went to work on a little rubbishy claim of ours that had a shaft on it eight feet deep.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们爬到山边很远的地方，开始对我们自己的一个小垃圾领地进行工作，那里有一个八英尺深的竖井

vocabulary.definition: n. 自杀；[法] 自杀
vocabulary.context: His canon 'gainst self-slaughter!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的经典"不要自残！"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不正直的, 罪深的, 邪恶的, 不公正的
vocabulary.context: Ere yet the salt of most unrighteous tears
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最不义的眼泪还没有盐化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 近亲相奸的, 乱伦的；[法] 乱伦的, 犯乱伦罪的
vocabulary.context: With such dexterity to incestuous sheets!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 乱伦床单如此灵巧！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未除(杂)草的
vocabulary.context: 'tis an unweeded garden,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一个没有杂草的花园，

vocabulary.definition: prep. 反抗, 抵抗(=against)
vocabulary.context: His canon 'gainst self-slaughter!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的经典"不要自残！"

vocabulary.definition: n. 胆汁, 五倍子, 苦味, 肿痛, 恼怒, 磨损处；v.t. 烦恼, 屈辱, 磨伤；v.i. 被磨伤
vocabulary.context: Had left the flushing in her galled eyes,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她那双受伤的眼睛里留下了红晕，

vocabulary.definition: n. 萨梯(森林之神), 好色之徒；[法] 色情狂者
vocabulary.context: Hyperion to a satyr; so loving to my mother
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 亥伯龙对色狼；如此爱我的母亲

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无利益的, 不赚钱的, 不上算的；[法] 无利可图的, 无益的
vocabulary.context: How weary, stale, flat and unprofitable,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多么疲倦、陈腐、平淡和无利可图，

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 持有, 占有, 拥有, 克制, 支配, 迷住；[法] 持有, 占有, 具有
vocabulary.context: Possess it merely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 仅仅拥有它

vocabulary.definition: adj. 装备不良的
vocabulary.context: and Filipino forces were unprepared and ill-equipped to defend themselves against the Japanese.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 菲律宾军队没有准备好，装备也不足，无法抵御日本人

vocabulary.definition: v. 用刺刀刺( bayonet的过去式和过去分词 ); 用刺刀, 劈刺
vocabulary.context: "He had been bayoneted by many, many bayonets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他被很多很多刺刀刺伤

vocabulary.definition: n. 美洲蒲葵
vocabulary.context: "I just rolled off of the road and got into the edge of the river and there's a lot of palmetto brush and weeds and one thing or another growing," Beck remembers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我刚刚从路上滚下来，进入河边，那里有很多棕榈树丛和杂草，还有这样或那样的东西在生长，"贝克回忆道

vocabulary.definition: adv. 逻辑地, 运筹地；在后勤方面
vocabulary.context: Because the Japanese defeated the Allied forces sooner than they had anticipated, they were not prepared, logistically and materially, to sustain tens of thousands of POWs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于日本人比他们预期的更早击败了盟军，他们在后勤和物质上都没有准备好维持数以万计的战俘

vocabulary.definition: adv. 概要地, 概略地, 立刻
vocabulary.context: Wounded prisoners were summarily executed; those who could not get up in the morning were buried alive or beaten to death.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 受伤囚犯被立即处决；早上起不来的，要么被活埋，要么被打死

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 斩首, 砍头
vocabulary.context: Those who straggled, broke ranks, fell, or simply refused to go on were shot, stabbed, bayoneted, and even beheaded.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那些掉队、破坏队伍、倒下或干脆拒绝继续前进的人被枪杀、刺伤、刺刀刺伤，甚至斩首

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 掉队, 落伍, 蔓延, 散乱；n. 低空扫射
vocabulary.context: Those who straggled, broke ranks, fell, or simply refused to go on were shot, stabbed, bayoneted, and even beheaded.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那些掉队、破坏队伍、倒下或干脆拒绝继续前进的人被枪杀、刺伤、刺刀刺伤，甚至斩首

vocabulary.definition: n. 着手, 开头, 最初
vocabulary.context: So at the outset of the Bataan Death March, the Japanese decided to reduce the number of prisoners by executing hundreds of Filipino officers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，在巴丹死亡行军开始时，日本人决定通过处决数百名菲律宾军官来减少囚犯人数

vocabulary.definition: adj. 禁止的, 禁止性的；[经] 禁止性的, 抑制的
vocabulary.context: However, between school tuition, traveling, and living in Paris, the cost of attending the Sorbonne was prohibitive for the Curies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，考虑到学费、旅行和在巴黎的生活，就读索邦大学的费用对居里夫妇来说太高了

vocabulary.definition: n. 沥青铀矿
vocabulary.context: They looked for uranium rays in a mineral called pitchblende.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在一种叫做沥青铀矿的矿物中寻找铀射线

vocabulary.definition: n. 钋；[化] 钋Po
vocabulary.context: After continuing to experiment with pitchblende they discovered two new elements that they named radium and polonium - named after Curie's native country of Poland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在继续对沥青铀矿进行实验后，他们发现了两种新元素，并将其命名为镭和钋--以居里的祖国波兰命名

vocabulary.definition: n. 募捐
vocabulary.context: Curie traveled to the United States to fundraise for her research and for the creation of a research institute.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 居里夫人前往美国为她的研究和创建研究所筹集资金

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发育不全的, 再生障碍的；[医] 发育不全的, 成形不全的; 再生障碍的
vocabulary.context: Curie died in 1934 when she was 66 years old of aplastic anemia, a disease that is often caused by prolonged exposure to radiation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 居里夫人于 1934 年去世，享年 66 岁，她死于再生障碍性贫血，这种疾病通常是由于长期暴露在辐射下引起的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未加热的,不热的
vocabulary.context: She survived off of bread and butter in an unheated apartment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在一间没有暖气的公寓里靠面包和黄油生存

vocabulary.definition: n. 贫血, 贫血症, 无活力；[医] 贫血
vocabulary.context: Curie died in 1934 when she was 66 years old of aplastic anemia, a disease that is often caused by prolonged exposure to radiation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 居里夫人于 1934 年去世，享年 66 岁，她死于再生障碍性贫血，这种疾病通常是由于长期暴露在辐射下引起的

vocabulary.definition: n. 论题, 论文
vocabulary.context: In 1903, when Curie finished her PhD at the Sorbonne, her examiners thought that her work was the greatest contribution to science ever made in a PhD thesis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1903年，当居里夫人在索邦大学完成博士学位时，她的审查员认为她的工作是博士论文中对科学做出的最大贡献

vocabulary.definition: v. 使感光过度( overexpose的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: Louis Hempelmann, the physician who served as the Manhattan Project Medical Director, stated afterwards, and I quote: ''A few people were probably overexposed, but they couldn't prove it and we couldn't prove it so we just assumed we got away with it.''
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 担任曼哈顿计划医疗主任的医生路易斯·亨佩尔曼（Louis Hempelmann）后来说道，我引用一下："有些人可能过度暴露，但他们无法证明这一点，我们也无法证明这一点，所以我们只是假设我们侥幸逃脱了惩罚。"

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 烧成灰, 灰化；v.t. 焚化
vocabulary.context: The remaining ten pounds of unfissioned plutonium was joined with the soil, the sand, and the animal and plant life in the area and incinerated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 剩余的十磅未裂变钚与该地区的土壤、沙子以及动植物生命结合在一起并被焚烧

vocabulary.definition: n. 钚；[化] 钚Pu
vocabulary.context: Because the scientists working on the project had to make certain the test was a success, the bomb was packed with 13 pounds of plutonium.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于从事该项目的科学家必须确保测试成功，因此炸弹中装有 13 磅钚

vocabulary.definition: n. 化学疗法；[化] 化学疗法
vocabulary.context: People tell me stories of how they hold bake sales to buy pain medications or how they have to sell cattle to pay for their chemotherapy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们告诉我他们如何举办烘焙义卖来购买止痛药，或者他们如何不得不卖牛来支付化疗费用

vocabulary.definition: adj. 顺风的；adv. 顺风
vocabulary.context: As a result of his exposure, he paid the ultimate price for simply being a child raised in a downwind community.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于他的暴露，他作为一个在顺风社区长大的孩子付出了最终的代价

vocabulary.definition: n. 半衰期, 半排出期；[化] 半衰期; 半寿期
vocabulary.context: The plutonium utilized has a half-life of 24,000 years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所使用的钚的半衰期为 24,000 年

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 去野餐, 参加野餐（picnic的过去式与过去分词形式）
vocabulary.context: People picnicked at the site and some ranchers have told me they hunted wild game there all the time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们在该地点野餐，一些牧场主告诉我他们一直在那里狩猎野生动物

vocabulary.definition: n. 化疗
vocabulary.context: Imagine what it's like to attend a funeral, a chemo infusion, or receive the horrible news that the cancer you've been fighting is back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 想象一下参加葬礼、接受化疗或收到您一直在对抗的癌症卷土重来的可怕消息是什么感觉

vocabulary.definition: n. 曝光过度；[医] 感光过度, 露光过度
vocabulary.context: My father's overexposure to high levels of radiation from the Trinity test as a child damaged his cells, which led to cancer and altered his DNA.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我父亲小时候过度暴露于三位一体测试的高水平辐射下，损害了他的细胞，导致癌症并改变了他的 DNA

vocabulary.definition: n. 爆炸, 爆裂, 爆炸声；[化] 爆轰(化学反应速度高于其声速); 爆震; 引爆
vocabulary.context: Part of the history of Trinity is that there was a time following the detonation when people were allowed to freely go in and out of the site without obstruction.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 圣三一历史的一部分是，爆炸后有一段时间，人们可以不受阻碍地自由进出该地点

vocabulary.definition: n. 再进入
vocabulary.context: Importantly, correctional officers have at least a two-year, university-level education and are directly involved in rehabilitation and planning for the incarcerated person's re-entry into the world outside of prison.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 重要的是，惩教人员至少接受过两年的大学教育，并直接参与被监禁者的康复和重新进入监狱外的世界的规划

vocabulary.definition: n. 中心装饰品；放在餐桌中央的摆饰
vocabulary.context: A large fish tank, maintained by staff and residents, is the centerpiece of an area designed to encourage people to gather.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个由工作人员和居民维护的大型鱼缸是该区域的中心，旨在鼓励人们聚集

vocabulary.definition: n. 常态；[化] 规定浓度; 当量浓度
vocabulary.context: In Norway, core values of safety, transparency and innovation are considered fundamental to the idea of creating normality in prison, the feeling that life as part of a community continues, even behind walls and bars.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在挪威，安全、透明和创新的核心价值观被认为是在监狱中创造常态的理念的基础，即即使在高墙和铁栅后面，作为社区一部分的生活仍在继续

vocabulary.definition: n. 家具, 服饰品, 陈设品, 设备
vocabulary.context: With single cells, a communal kitchen, Nordic-like furnishings and a landscaped, outdoor green space, Little Scandinavia looks unlike any other U.S.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小斯堪的纳维亚拥有单间牢房、公用厨房、北欧风格的家具和风景优美的户外绿地，看起来与美国任何其他地方都不同

vocabulary.definition: n. 累犯；[医] 复发趋向, 再发趋向, 再犯趋向
vocabulary.context: It is also worth noting that recidivism rates in Scandinavia are low.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还值得注意的是，斯堪的纳维亚半岛的累犯率较低

vocabulary.definition: adj. 直接的, 第一手的；adv. 直接地
vocabulary.context: As part of our research, we are examining correctional staff's first-hand experiences with this international project.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为我们研究的一部分，我们正在研究惩教人员在这个国际项目中的第一手经验

vocabulary.definition: adj. 基础的, 基本的
vocabulary.context: This effort is a pilot, however, with significant costs, foundational support from committed leaders, and in partnership with many outside experts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，这项工作只是一项试点，成本高昂，需要坚定的领导者的基础支持，并与许多外部专家合作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 哲学的, 冷静的, 达观的, 哲学上的, 哲学家似的
vocabulary.context: Correctional systems throughout much of Scandinavia are guided by a general set of philosophical principles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯堪的纳维亚大部分地区的惩教系统都遵循一套通用的哲学原则

vocabulary.definition: n. 主张社会同化者
vocabulary.context: The federal government outlawed Native American traditions as part of its assimilationist push.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 联邦政府宣布美洲原住民传统为非法，作为其同化主义推动的一部分

vocabulary.definition: n. 塞块, 木楔, 楔形木垫；v.t. 用楔子垫阻, 收放定盘上；adv. 满满地
vocabulary.context: Why We Serve is chock full of profiles - from the story of William Pollock, a Pawnee who enlisted and became a vaunted member of Theodore Roosevelt's Rough Riders in Cuba during the Spanish American War to Lori Ann Piestewa, a Hopi citizen who was ambushed and taken prisoner in Iraq in 2003 and died in an Iraqi hospital.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《我们为何服务》充满了人物简介--从波尼族人威廉·波洛克（William Pollock）的故事，到美西战争期间在古巴加入西奥多·罗斯福麾下的粗暴骑士团并成为其中一名备受赞誉的成员，到 2003 年在伊拉克遭到伏击并被俘并死于伊拉克医院的霍皮族公民洛里·安·皮斯特瓦（Lori Ann Piestewa）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 只需要一个人的, 由一个人经营的, 由一个人做的, 由一个人组成的
vocabulary.context: In Korea, Keeble launched a one-man assault against a line of Chinese-held bunkers manned by machine gunners.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在韩国，基布尔对一排中国人控制的由机枪手守卫的掩体发起了单人攻击

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不严密的, 不精确的, 不明确的
vocabulary.context: "Demographic data about the ethnicity of American servicemen and women has historically been imprecise, and the number of Native Americans who served in the military are, for the most part, estimates," according to Harris.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哈里斯表示，"关于美国军人种族的人口统计数据历来并不精确，在军队服役的美洲原住民人数大部分都是估计值"

vocabulary.definition: v. 自夸；n. 自吹自擂
vocabulary.context: Why We Serve is chock full of profiles - from the story of William Pollock, a Pawnee who enlisted and became a vaunted member of Theodore Roosevelt's Rough Riders in Cuba during the Spanish American War to Lori Ann Piestewa, a Hopi citizen who was ambushed and taken prisoner in Iraq in 2003 and died in an Iraqi hospital.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《我们为何服务》充满了人物简介--从波尼族人威廉·波洛克（William Pollock）的故事，到美西战争期间在古巴加入西奥多·罗斯福麾下的粗暴骑士团并成为其中一名备受赞誉的成员，到 2003 年在伊拉克遭到伏击并被俘并死于伊拉克医院的霍皮族公民洛里·安·皮斯特瓦（Lori Ann Piestewa）

vocabulary.definition: adv. 偷偷摸摸地；秘密地
vocabulary.context: But military service afforded Indigenous people a way to covertly or even overtly get back to some of those practices.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但服兵役为原住民提供了一种秘密甚至公开恢复其中一些做法的方式

vocabulary.definition: n. 征募, 服役期限
vocabulary.context: And, when the Selective Service Act was passed in 1917, which led to the draft, it was unclear to the military how to handle enlistment of American Indians who were not U.S.

He blasted the "murderous robbers from Missouri," calling them "hirelings, picked from the drunken spew and vomit of an uneasy civilization." He verbally attacked South Carolina's pro-slavery Senator Andrew Butler.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...在参议院发表了题为"针对堪萨斯的罪行"的痛苦演讲。他猛烈抨击了"来自密苏里州的凶残强盗"，称他们为"从不稳定文明的醉酒呕吐物中挑选出来的雇工"。他口头攻击南卡罗来纳州支持奴隶制的参议员安德鲁·巴特勒

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不能取消地, 不能撤回地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该法案的通过不可避免地分裂了辉格党，辉格党是一个最初致力于增强国会对总统权力的主要政党

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管他们的选票后来被裁定为欺诈，但他们的候选人还是当选为国会议员

vocabulary.definition: n. 恶棍, 无赖；adj. 凶恶的, 残忍的, 残暴的

vocabulary.definition: n. 税款, 所征的人数, 征收；v.i. 征税, 课税；v.t. 征收, 强求, 召集

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布鲁克斯被处以 300 美元罚款，辞职后返回南卡罗来纳州的家乡，那里的人们为他举行了纪念活动，并再次选举他担任众议院席位

vocabulary.definition: n. 危害; 受到危害
vocabulary.context: At the moment, we are simply relying on the intuitions of neighbors, police officers, DAs, judges, etc., to decide what constitutes negligence or endangerment, and we've shown that those intuitions are systematically influenced by their moral approval or disapproval of the parent's conduct.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 目前，我们只是依靠邻居、警察、地方检察官、法官等的直觉来决定什么构成疏忽或危害，并且我们已经表明，这些直觉系统地受到他们对父母行为的道德认可或反对的影响

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可论证的
vocabulary.context: The relevant "danger" should be legally defined in terms of actual, immediate, demonstrable risk, rather than left up to the unexamined intuitions of bystanders, social workers, police officers or other individuals who may think something must be dangerous when it is actually quite safe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相关的"危险"应该在法律上根据实际的、直接的、可证明的风险来定义，而不是由旁观者、社会工作者、警察或其他个人未经审查的直觉来定义，他们可能认为某件事实际上很安全，但它一定是危险的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可欣然接受地, 承受得住地, 能合人意地
vocabulary.context: What's interesting about this phobia about leaving a child alone is that (1) it is so widely shared, and (2) it has acquired the force of law - Harrell and Brooks were literally charged with crimes for allowing their children to be alone in circumstances that were, in their judgment as parents, age-appropriate and acceptably low-risk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种让孩子独自一人的恐惧症的有趣之处在于（1）它如此广泛地传播，（2）它已经获得了法律效力--哈雷尔和布鲁克斯实际上被指控犯有罪行，因为他们允许他们的孩子在他们作为父母的判断中，在适合年龄和可接受的低风险的情况下独自一人

vocabulary.context: This isn't to deny the possibility of visionaries - people with the creativity and daring to imagine how things could be different.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 德国军队被缩减为国内警察部队，其领土也被缩减至 1914 年 7 月（费迪南大公遇刺后）至 1918 年 11 月

vocabulary.definition: adj. 卧床不起的；[医] 卧床不起的

vocabulary.context: Over the next two decades, the United States would sit on the sidelines as the Treaty of Versailles and the ineffective League of Nations would set the stage for an even bloodier clash.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接下来的二十年里，美国将袖手旁观，因为《凡尔赛条约》和无效的国际联盟将为一场更加血腥的冲突奠定基础

vocabulary.definition: n. 补偿, 赔偿, 弥补, 修复, 修理；[经] 赔偿, 补偿, 修理

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 德国承认对战争有罪并支付无限的赔款

vocabulary.definition: n. 孤立主义

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经过两年半的孤立主义，美国加入了第一次世界大战

vocabulary.definition: n. 马饰, 服饰, 礼服, 装饰品, 外部标志
vocabulary.context: Many fell prey to the trappings of Paris nightlife while awaiting transfer to the front.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人在等待转移到前线的过程中陷入了巴黎夜生活的陷阱

vocabulary.definition: n. 解除, 免除, 免税；[化] 免检

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 上次使用征兵制导致了巨大的骚乱，因为富人可以购买豁免权

vocabulary.definition: n. 例外论
vocabulary.context: When European conflicts erupted, as they frequently did, many in the United States claimed exceptionalism: America was different.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当欧洲冲突爆发时（正如它们经常发生的那样），许多美国人声称存在例外论：美国是不同的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 洪水的, 灾变的, 政治和社会大变动的
vocabulary.context: Two dangerous decades of political isolationism followed, only to end in an ever more cataclysmic war.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 接下来的两个危险的政治孤立主义十年，最终以一场更加灾难性的战争结束

vocabulary.definition: n. 机枪；v.t. 用机枪射击, 用机枪击中
vocabulary.context: Machine-gun nests, barbed wire, and mines blocked the opposing side from capturing the enemy trench.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 机枪掩体、铁丝网和地雷阻止了对方占领敌方战壕

vocabulary.definition: n. 独裁主义；权力主义
vocabulary.context: He greatly admired the British government, and democracy in any form was preferable to German authoritarianism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他非常钦佩英国政府，任何形式的民主都比德国的威权主义更可取

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使处于危险, 危害
